name: Tyler (Team Shedd)
subject: why you should vote for Tiffany (Please Read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, If you’re sick and tired of seeing the socialist bullies trampling our constitutional rights and passing legislation that harms our communities, then you’re in good company. Arizona needs a **STRONG** Attorney General who will fight for **OUR PRIORITIES** every single day. We need an Attorney General like Tiffany Shedd. **Tiffany is fighting to: ** ✅ Secure the Border ✅ Support Arizona Police ✅ Protect our Second Amendment rights ✅ Hold Big Tech Accountable ✅ Secure our Elections ✅ Protect Arizona Jobs
Our first end of the month deadline is **TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT**. We need to reach this goal to STOP the progressive agenda. This is our FIRST end-of-month deadline, of this campaign, so it’s crucial that we meet our goal of raising **$8,000 BEFORE tomorrow at midnight**. Can Tiffany count on you? [**Donate $25**](http://links.sheddforarizona.com/u/click?_t=3976c740fd034a649aaaca1d18b056d2&_m=98cb2d907eae4949aa93cc62cefeba51&_e=nhl81pUmwRSah-GDrDn1lookA02OuxLgik52h6Tzu00UqlI4d7fcyVEh3pz1eV-8-Kp-DgIZm-CfXm98LvCDBvKtNlhEXtz2bxCyqfR0vrb4LTe9OYyLSVqeDA2Whl7tRk4d4cbG6mIdsoqTBip5ynhJQbS9hRqx4MT9Qxdm9bVH4qkBFU3r4P-lG2cyLs_oUSXAfNzZojru1K7aKdKUVkOkFG7-iT4I6n10rg8qJSiSZ4iPDVmtbETJq6Y2tIwkI5juvCgCZ-39ydhhJTjrDQPn3Lqk7J5LQJmJa7CBr_xmXFXJDMmWwgY3xm71S2ZuFDHOCfYTHjwiTYZHwazBkVj7vvenwC0g_eT7h4sqNcEYDLbXHFGawCbPjdOy0qVozFKky5gS2kEdFTejhD5GbNnVuprN4JGrWr916A1a6YeVa1kXV0SxNp8jL-mnYhPK0BeRVMpRK2qP3SdiGGWGcQ%3D%3D) name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Your personal link
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210429-2058-header&t=1&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)
We’ll be straightforward with you: With only one day before our April fundraising deadline, we’re still falling short of our important goal.
**Below we’re going to lay out why a $3 contribution from you — especially before tomorrow’s deadline — would make a significant difference for our work together, but if you’re ready to chip in now, please make a contribution below to your personal link:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-1?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-1?refcode=em20210429-2058-P&personal=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2058_2526796_ix1z-J&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)
Here’s the work your contribution is funding:
1. **Preparing for a tough re-election in 2022:** Our race was one of the most expensive races in the country last year — Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to unseat Alexandria. As she continues to use her voice in Congress to fight for progressive change, we can expect next year’s re-election to be another massive and expensive race funded by wealthy special interests, so we need to start raising resources now to prepare.
2. **Building resources to make local and community-focused impact:** When two massive fires broke out in Jackson Heights, Queens, we were able to raise over $28K for community members and small business owners to rebuild. And when the establishment leadership left the new progressive leadership in Nevada’s Democratic Party without a penny, we were able to raise over $26K to build back their reserves.
3. **Passing progressive policies:** Alexandria joined Senator Markey and their colleagues last week to re-introduce the Green New Deal. In order to get policies like the Green New Deal and more passed, we need to show our fellow legislators that their constituents demand progressive change too. With your help, we can organize and strengthen the grassroots movement behind our key policy priorities in Congress so that we can win some big legislative victories this cycle.

Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. And when we receive enough support from small-dollar donors to hit each and every monthly goal, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement and enact progressive change in the years to come.
We still have a significant gap in fundraising to fill before tomorrow's deadline, but if everyone who is reading this email chips in $3 — or anything they can today — we’ll be able to catch up. **If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a contribution today?**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-1?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-1?refcode=em20210429-2058-P&personal=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2058_2526796_ix1z-J&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)
Together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-1?refcode=em20210429-2058-P&t=4&refcode2=2058_2526796_ix1z-J&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2058%2E2526796%2Eix1z-J)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Lisa Was Arrested Today
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **BREAKING NEWS: Lisa Hanson was arrested today, marking the first small business owner arrested for defying Governor Walz' illegal, unilateral orders.[She was arrested](https://www.action4liberty.com/lisa_hanson_arrested?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=2) after being targeted by government for, get this, opening up her restaurant. **
## Unbelievable!
This Saturday, there is an event in Albert Lea called "Stand for Liberty" to support Lisa Hanson's Legal Defense. You see, Lisa did something courageous last year that needs to be supported. She joined dozens of other small businesses who publicly defied Governor Walz' illegal and unconstitutional orders to shut down. Like Jane, Larvita and the rest, Lisa ended up being targeted by Attorney General Keith Ellison on behalf of Walz' Dept of Health. You know, the agency that was recently caught attempting to doctor evidence in order to support Walz' illegal orders! Also, an agency on the cusp of being fully funded by Republicans in the Minnesota Senate! **Lisa has been in out of courts since last December fighting for her and YOUR liberties. And now, she has officially been arrested by the government.** Learning about Lisa's arrest warrant, haters in the Woke Mob quickly took to social media this week condemning you and me for supporting Lisa's courageous stance. They equated not following Walz' illegal orders to the lawlessness of the rioters & looters in Minneapolis. And their allies in the media joined with them. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/woke_mob_trying_to_derail_stand_for_liberty_event_on_saturday?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=3) **I'm actually going to be speaking at this event on Saturday and I'll tell you one thing: I DO NOT BACK DOWN TO THE WOKE MOB!** In fact, the whole team at Action 4 Liberty REFUSES to back down to the Woke Mob. And so does our Liberty Champion Erik Mortensen, who will be joining me on stage in support of Lisa this Saturday in Albert Lea. **It's important that we STAND UP for our liberties and our Constitutional Republic. If we don't, America as we know it, may fail.** In Minnesota, we are on the cusp of something HUGE. Just yesterday, we had another Senator sign onto the Never Again Bill. I want to thank [Sen Rich Draheim](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UdUBanIu4fbXqYu4bSwW_eYo8iVfNQjFsUbqM2vjwm-Ojkn81yTCv7Yg2rFomxNXY5UG65zH0gwHaaMCXC9hIQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=4) for standing up for Minnesotans! The Never Again Bill is gaining momentum. Unfortunately, we'll need more than just Rich Draheim to ensure that the Senate makes no Deals With Democrats until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed. Will you help me out? **Lisa Hanson's life and liberty are at stake. And so are yours if Senate Republicans don't STAND UP RIGHT NOW! If they pass a budget that funds Governor Walz' agencies, then I'm afraid we may lose the best chance we have to ensure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN.** We've heard from capitol insiders that the Senate is beginning to crack on plowing forward with the budget until Emergency Powers are ended. **Your pressure is working!!!** That's why it's critically important that you contact your state senator RIGHT NOW and tell him or her "No Deals With Democrats on the budget until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed".
## [**FIND YOUR SENATOR**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=5)
If you are interested in attending the Stand for Liberty Rally on Saturday, [here are the details](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWHIAvD4mTFBzK1YQ_jRRQ0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=6) **Location: Fountain Lake Park in Albert Lea** **When: Saturday, May 1st from 2 pm to 7 pm** Don't like calling or emailing a politician? That's fine. You can support us in another way by equipping our team with the resources to continue putting the pressure on politicians! [**Help support our field operations by donating $100 today! If that's too much, $50 or $25 is extremely helpful as well.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=7) I love fighting shoulder-to-shoulder with Patriots like you. **But we must give it everything we have in these last couple weeks of the session.** With your **[help](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=8)** , we can win this battle to End Walz' Emergency Powers and make sure this Never Happens Again. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woke_mob_wont_silence_us&n=11), software for leaders.

We've heard from capitol insiders that the Senate is beginning to crack on plowing forward with the budget until Emergency Powers are ended. Your pressure is working!!! That's why it's critically important that you contact your state senator RIGHT NOW and tell him or her "No Deals With Democrats on the budget until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed". If you are interested in attending the Stand for Liberty Rally on Saturday, Location: Fountain Lake Park in Albert Lea When: Saturday, May 1st from 2 pm to 7 pm Don't like calling or emailing a politician? That's fine. You can support us in another way by equipping our team with the resources to continue putting the pressure on politicians! I love fighting shoulder-to-shoulder with Patriots like you. But we must give it everything we have in these last couple weeks of the session. With your , we can win this battle to End Walz' Emergency Powers and make sure this Never Happens Again. In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

body:

If the Left-wing Democrats keep up their momentum, the future
will be full of higher taxes, open borders, the Green New Deal,
and harsh restrictions on our Constitutional freedoms.

Peter, I walked off stage and I did not get the news I was
hoping for...

My staff informed me that Democrats raised $123,087 during my
speech. This is on top of the $315,058 raised while President
Biden was speaking. This money will be going directly to the
Left's plan to move us toward socialism.

Democrats intend to blanket TV stations and radio waves across
America, pushing their radical transformation of our country, and
we CANNOT allow them to get away with this.

I need you to join me in protecting the American Dream right now,
Peter.

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Interesting Facts
body:
This will be the last email that I send out regarding my work at the Freedom Foundation. If you would like to stay up to date with our work, please subscribe to [our email update](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57272232:JDdLd4uN3:m:1:3261058643:7E1D33E3FA3FE78B1F87BDA815B73F22:r).

Here's a cold hard fact.

_In 2016, government unions in my home state of Oregon put $15.6 million into political spending._

Just think of the doors that money opens in the state capital. The influence it buys. And all the backroom deals that come your way when you give that kind of money.

u Government contracts...
u Favoritism from regulators...
u ...and raw power to drown out the voices of hardworking Americans like you and me.

I know that my opponent received hundreds of thousands of dollars from unions in our recent congressional race--money that helped tip the race his way. Now the unions have him on speed dial, and he's available at their beck and call.

That's not right. That's not American. That's not the democracy we deserve.

Only one group is doing something about it: the Freedom Foundation.

**I joined forces with the Freedom Foundation because their decisive actions are really working**.

The Freedom Foundation is giving workers the information and the help they need to opt****_out_ of unions--to take back their paycheck and their freedom. In the past two years, the Freedom Foundation has helped nearly 100,000 people break free of government unions, costing those unions over $150 million in dues.

After four years of working in Oregon, the Freedom Foundation has cut union political spending to just $4.3 million--a 72 percent decrease!

It's still too much. But if we can continue to clamp down on government union political spending, and put that money back in the pockets of middle-class Americans, we can finally level the playing field and ensure that conservative views finally get a fair hearing.

The Freedom Foundation has **_the plan_** , and **_the team_** , and **_the tenacity_** to **_get the job done_**.

That's why I've joined the Freedom Foundation...and that's why I hope you will too.

[Please click here to make your most generous gift](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57272232:JDdLd4uN3:m:1:3261058643:7E1D33E3FA3FE78B1F87BDA815B73F22:r) possible to support the Freedom Foundation's work to end the undue influence of government unions and their funding of the extreme left.

As I mentioned in my email the other day, every dollar you can give results in $24 that the unions no longer have to fund their toxic policy ideas that are bad for America. And because of a generous matching pledge, your gift now has DOUBLE the impact, with every one dollar resulting in $48 in lost funding for the left.

Taking on government unions is perhaps the single most important thing we can do to take our country back and ensure that our shared conservative values get a fair hearing.

I've teamed up with the Freedom Foundation to take this fight to all 50 states, and I hope you will join us! Thank you, and I look forward to welcoming you as the newest supporter of the Freedom Foundation's work to defeat the unions and take back America!

In freedom,

Alek

PS: Thank you so much for your support. If we keep working together, I truly believe we have a path to victory. name: Rep. Gloria Johnson
subject: Stop Bill Lee and his puppets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Peter
It’s Representative Gloria Johnson here and I represent House District 13 in the Tennessee legislature. I’m sure you have seen the headlines, but Bill Lee’s puppets in the legislature are wreaking havoc on our state. Under his leadership, they are passing legislation that harms every day Tennessee families and he is wasting no time in signing this policy into law.
Tennesseans desperately need doctors and hospitals that don’t bankrupt their families, but Gov. Lee does nothing, though it would not cost our state one penny to expand Medicaid. One million students need public schools with resources and highly trained teachers, and Gov. Lee does nothing as we remain 46th in funding in the country. Too many families can’t afford food and rent, and Gov. Lee is bragging about fast low-pay food jobs and cuts to unemployment.
It’s time for a change, Tennessee families need a governor who understands the kitchen table issues they face each day — not an out of touch multimillionaire.
Yesterday, a group of Tennesseans across the state, from all different backgrounds, launched Beat Bill Lee , a PAC to stop the power grab from fringe right wing Bill Lee and the dark money interest groups he represents. But we cannot do this alone.
Are you able to chip in or sign up for a recurring donation? Every cent counts and will go toward replacing Bill Lee with a governor who will work with Tennessee’s legislature to actually improve lives for Tennesseans.
Thank you so much for your support, it’s going to take all of us working together!
-Rep. Gloria Johnson
Make a Donation to Beat Bill Lee! PS- Don't forget to follow us on social media!
https://www.facebook.com/beatbilllee [https://www.facebook.com/beatbilllee] https://twitter.com/beatbilllee [https://twitter.com/beatbilllee] https://www.instagram.com/beatbilllee/ [https://www.instagram.com/beatbilllee/]
PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
Beat Bill Lee PAC
1831 12th Avenue Street Suite #113
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

subject: we screwed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28443982/283262956/-2023814932?refcode=20210430_TM_4BC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTkxOGZmMC1iOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eikdco4nN09bXp8AIUlcrPbopIf1YmjXmC48HamMJyQ=)

| | Just got off the phone with my campaign manager, Derek -- **and we screwed up.**

We really thought we were on track for our best month of online fundraising yet, but it looks like we got it wrong. Someone on my team must have miscalculated somewhere -- and look, these things happen. People make mistakes. I get that.

The problem is, we’re scrambling to get back on track before this becomes a serious problem for our campaign. Heck, we’re already being outspent by Republicans. We can’t afford any more screw-ups.

**[Can you rush a donation of $15 or more to help us make up for this temporary lapse in our fundraising? name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Liberals Hate Black Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY
body:
Mailchimp Email Design Reference Search Email Design Reference Resources HTML to Text Email Converter It's always a good idea to send a plain-text version of your HTML email. Writing one from scratch can be tedious, so this handy tool automatically creates a text version of your HTML email. Paste your email's HTML below, click Convert, and you'll get a text version that's ready to send. http://email.vervemail.com/p/vJvWxP4uQN

Peter:

Senator Tim Scott, Rep. Burgess Owens, State Rep. Vernon Jones, and candidate Ronda Kennedy. All four of these great Americans are strong Black Conservatives.

If you don't know their names, you need to look them up and then help us support them.

While Joe Biden and the Democrats are busy trying to redefine America, they have prioritized illegal immigrants over the needs of Black America. We'd have one more black man in the U.S. Senate this year, but the Democrats did everything they could to stop combat veteran John James from winning.

After 100 days in office, there is now a groundswell of Black Americans who have had enough of Joe Biden and the Democrats talking about equality and prioritizing illegal aliens over citizens. Nominating an old racist like Joe Biden for President – then simply assuming we have to vote for him because Cardi B says so—we're not dumb.

Liberals HATE Black Republicans. That's why we need more of them in Congress and why the New Journey PAC needs your immediate support to recruit and train them with enough time for them to implement a strategy to win.

I started the New Journey PAC to support Black Conservatives, to change the media's narrative of Black America as welfare recipients. To make Black America Conservative Again.

My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley – the man behind the glass listening to the one and only Rush Limbaugh for more than 30 years.

Rush talked about this issue for years, and if we don't do something now, it will be too late for an entire generation of Black kids in America who will think Kamala Harris and Stacey Abrams are black politicians they should emulate and never give a look towards our black, conservative candidates who all have great stories about overcoming adversity and living their version of the American Dream.

We need to counter the liberal lies from the media, but we can't do that unless we have the resources to open office and put staff in these communities. Join us TODAY with your gift of $45, $100, or even $1,000 and help the Black children and their parents see a path towards the American Dream the Democrat Party has been hiding from them.

For decades, the left has stoked racial division in America because it is good for business. It's simply a ploy for leftist black democrats and their friends like Joe Biden to keep their grasp on POWER—by putting down other Black Americans.

They then applaud when BLM and Antifa burn down our neighborhoods while watching TV from their gated communities.

They aren't interested in bringing jobs and opportunity to these neighborhoods – only in destroying it to further their cause and promising more handouts – as long as we keep voting the right way.

Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 at this time will help us have a FIVE-FOLD impact on our efforts to lay the groundwork to support Black Conservative candidates and GET THEM TO CONGRESS TO FIGHT.

We can help Black America overcome decades of lies and destruction, but only if we have your help. Imagine what they'll do when they hear about the government handouts to illegal aliens that have never been offered to Black America but are championed by the Democrat Party.

Don't delay. Please donate to our efforts today.

Time for a New Journey,


James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Marco Lopez
subject: Go big or go home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Friend, in a state like Arizona, you can't help but think big.
Only in Arizona can a child of immigrants like me grow up to be a border city mayor, serve in the Obama administration and start their own small business. That's the promise of opportunity Arizona offers to anyone who works hard and dreams big.

Unfortunately, under the failed leadership of Republicans like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey, that promise is no longer being met. On every issue from education to voting rights to health care to jobs, the GOP is committed to thinking as small as they can. The only thing GOP extremists will go big on is conspiracy theories and lies.
**I know we're better than the pettiness of our current leadership. That's why I'm running for governor: to break out of putting politics ahead of working families. I want an Arizona where big, bold, brave ideas help move our state forward. I know you have some big ideas of your own, too. So I want to hear them and build them into the strategy for our campaign. **
**[Friend, I'm personally asking: Will you take just 60 seconds now to take our campaign's priorities survey and share your ideas with me? Your feedback is essential to helping us defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28449341/283284311/2019149501?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18038&firstname=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk45-su-welcome&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgzMmVkOS1jNGE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D_2coWb2da3FTTO2iacit6CygWC1KmPC7BnGmfMwF4=&emci=2b64e602-c193-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=eb832ed9-c4a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=6085109)**
| | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28449342/283284312/2019149501?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18038&firstname=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk45-su-welcome&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgzMmVkOS1jNGE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9D_2coWb2da3FTTO2iacit6CygWC1KmPC7BnGmfMwF4=&emci=2b64e602-c193-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=eb832ed9-c4a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=6085109)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh?=
subject: Will we win the civil war?
body:
We cannot let Jack Ciattarelli win our party’s nomination for Governor and take us back to the RINO days of losing elections. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/will-we-win-the-civil-war?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=0a6e69fdf4&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend,

If President Trump taught us one thing, it's this:
## Never back down from defending our principles.
Too many in the Republican Party believe that if they just play nice in the sandbox with the Democrats, the Democrats will be nice to them.

[But nothing could be further from the truth](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=e57f115173&e=3e017fab0f).

The Democrat Party is out for blood: total control of government, complete manipulation of the people, and permanent power to expand their influence over every aspect of our lives.

Phil Murphy has exhibited these tendencies for three-and-a-half years while weak-kneed Republican "leaders" have allowed him to manipulate elections, raise taxes, and borrow without voter approval.

Murphy closed schools, restaurants, and gyms while sending COVID positive patients to infect vulnerable populations in our nursing homes.

But who among our Republican "leaders" stood up to him?

No one.

That's why I say there is a civil war in the Republican Party to determine what direction we intend to go in: Will we stand up to Murphy and the radical left or fall on our knees like servants to a tyrant?

You'll help determine the future of our Party in the gubernatorial primary. If nominated, I'll proudly defend our families, our businesses, and our way of life without hesitation or fear.

[Join our movement today and help send the RINOs a message: The battle is raging and its time we had a leader willing to fight](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5396540981&e=3e017fab0f).
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Make New Jersey Great Again!
---
|
P.S.: Just as New Jersey was the crossroads of the Revolution in 1776, the future of the conservative movement will be determined here. Will we continue to build on the progress President Trump made or will we go back to the bad old days of wishy-washy candidates like Mitt Romney? [Your help would mean a lot to me and our movement; Join today](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=74d038d5bf&e=3e017fab0f)!

**-H.V.S**
---
|

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: we know these emails pile up (sorry!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey there — we know these emails pile up, but we promise there’s a good reason we’re reaching out again.
The thing is, Republican Senator Pat Toomey has been a disgrace to Pennsylvania’s working families.
It’s the truth! And we’re glad he’s retiring, but the reality is that the PA GOP could nominate someone much worse to take his place.
**So we’re building a huge movement starting NOW to replace him with a working-class champion — someone who will go to bat for working families and NEVER back down.**
That’s Malcolm. He’s been fighting for our progressive agenda (including a $15 living wage, canceling student debt, and climate justice) in Harrisburg, and now, we’re taking this fight to the U.S. Senate.
[A big surge of donations before our midnight deadline is just what we need to finish April strong and get to work building a broad coalition of support behind Malcolm. Can you pitch in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28452402/283295428/-347207331?refcode2=92046477-cba9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjA0NjQ3Ny1jYmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zlJQWQkA8iGniz7t2odc8mOQlcjmFeGEJgPLTQLr5tg=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28452404/283295429/-347207331?refcode2=92046477-cba9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjA0NjQ3Ny1jYmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zlJQWQkA8iGniz7t2odc8mOQlcjmFeGEJgPLTQLr5tg=)**
Look, any Democrat would be a better senator than Pat Toomey, but we can’t just send anybody to Washington.
We deserve leaders who look like us and will fight to put our families — and our struggles — first.
And no other candidate in this race knows the struggles working people face better than Malcolm.
He knows what it’s like to face eviction, live with a mountain of student debt, and watch family members ration insulin because it’s too expensive.
So we know that Malcolm will go to the Senate and fight every day to meet the challenges of poverty, climate, debt, housing, and healthcare — but it’s our job to get him there.
**Are you with us? If you’re able, please pitch in a few bucks before we close the books on April. Your donation is vital in helping us build this movement on a solid foundation.**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28452410/283295430/-347207331?refcode2=92046477-cba9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjA0NjQ3Ny1jYmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zlJQWQkA8iGniz7t2odc8mOQlcjmFeGEJgPLTQLr5tg=)**
Thanks for helping out today,
Team Malcolm

subject: Wanted to make sure you saw this message from Mike Espy

body:
| Hi team, Alexis Magnan-Callaway here, the digital director for The Fairness Project. I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Mike Espy about our work at The Fairness Project, how we’re overcoming politics as usual and winning real change through people-powered ballot initiatives. **We’ve won 20 campaigns in just five years to expand health care, raise wages, and guarantee paid leave -- in red and blue states.** Real change in red states is hard, but we’ve gotten it done. Our campaigns have been attacked by the special interests, but we’ve fought back and won. **Now we’re getting ready to launch more campaigns for economic, racial, and gender justice -- but we need your help to have what it takes to win these tough campaigns.** **[Help The Fairness Project cut through the partisan noise and keep winning real change by making a contribution today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28452657/283296270/-1078230000?refcode=em2kicker_restdonorsopens_0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI2NTgwMi1jY2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht9CSlhtOqDAAyDkkrHGmB6qO6pR2GWHgvT68BGf2ME=)** | **[Donate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28452658/283296271/-1078230000?refcode=em2kicker_restdonorsopens_0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI2NTgwMi1jY2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht9CSlhtOqDAAyDkkrHGmB6qO6pR2GWHgvT68BGf2ME=)**
---
Thanks for being by our side for this work. And stay tuned for some exciting announcements in the weeks ahead!
Alexis Magnan-Callaway
Digital Director, The Fairness Project
_\-- Begin forwarded message: --_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28452659/283296272/-1078230000?refcode=em2kicker_restdonorsopens_0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI2NTgwMi1jY2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht9CSlhtOqDAAyDkkrHGmB6qO6pR2GWHgvT68BGf2ME=)
Hi friend, Mike Espy here.
As you know, I ran for the U.S. Senate in Mississippi in 2018 and 2020. And while I came up short, I learned some valuable lessons along the way.
I saw how people across the political spectrum -- Democrats and Republicans, folks in cities and our friends in rural areas -- can come together across common sense issues, like expanding health care.
But I also saw firsthand some of the ways those in power hold us back from winning real change.
**Red states are often low on the priority list for top donors and the media. The candidates we expect to win often fall short. The special interests launch dirty attacks and spread misinformation.**
That’s why I’m such a fan of The Fairness Project. They avoid politics as usual by running people-powered ballot initiatives, to win real change by putting policy issues directly before voters.
And it’s working. _In just five years, they’ve won 20 campaigns and changed over 17 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, and moving our country forward_.
But they’re a small and scrappy organization that doesn’t get the attention of swing-state Senate campaigns or major progressive organizations. And they still get attacked by radical right-wing politicians and corporate donors.
**They’re getting ready to launch more campaigns in red, purple, and blue states across the country -- notably to expand Medicaid when politicians refuse to help. But they need our help.**
**[Can you make a donation to The Fairness Project to help them fight back against the attacks and win more campaigns for economic, racial, and gender justice?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28452660/283296273/-1078230000?refcode=em2kicker_restdonorsopens_0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI2NTgwMi1jY2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht9CSlhtOqDAAyDkkrHGmB6qO6pR2GWHgvT68BGf2ME=) **
**[Donate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28452661/283296274/-1078230000?refcode=em2kicker_restdonorsopens_0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI2NTgwMi1jY2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht9CSlhtOqDAAyDkkrHGmB6qO6pR2GWHgvT68BGf2ME=)**
---
I’m so grateful for your continued support of winning real progressive change. Too much is at stake. Too many working families need higher wages, access to health care, and paid leave.
Together, we’ll keep moving our country forward and fighting against the special interests.
Sincerely,
Mike Espy
**[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28452662/283296275/-1078230000?refcode=em2kicker_restdonorsopens_0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI2NTgwMi1jY2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht9CSlhtOqDAAyDkkrHGmB6qO6pR2GWHgvT68BGf2ME=)**

Monday, May 3 at 1 pm ET

Everyone has a personal story worth telling. And sharing it is an
incredible way to build a relationship with voters, volunteers,
and donors. Join us for this training to learn how you can turn

Freedom or socialism?

The choice is yours, Friend.

Tim Ryan, Democratic candidate for Ohio's US Senate seat, is WAY too liberal for Ohio -- he has admitted that he's in lockstep with all progressives, even AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Nancy Pelosi. He's a proud supporter of open border policies and the Green New Deal, and, if elected, **there 's no telling what other reckless, socialist ideas he would help to advance. **

If we're going to preserve our freedom, and defend our conservative values in Congress, we absolutely cannot let Ryan or any other Washington progressives come out ahead in this race.

[**I 'm counting on grassroots patriots like YOU, Friend, to join me in this fight to defend our freedom, our individual liberty, and the America First agenda. CLICK HERE to help me fight back against to the progressive, socialist Left >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nZB7u16uGScUXJ4lPwvfubOK_--vrMrtKV-blXsPYB_-S_L0FOyUjv4W8M-dH1qEPMxTnurTWbJxGlSwH2Z0JRNrisLs2AuKmaqQMjN793X6rQWJGN3pQws0CTObR-gWe5eAGTKrKrL9YWbP2MU-igt9xq5JMv6qwk6vVEYSIaeqN3XTaoUE0569pgDuuai6yj4VdT1nfXFrBAlndOK2rpXB_QtSgPnx3jxdwDNePevNy4vP--QBFSW81lRufCdVgenG2TTaP-P18URZKeZ1rh-UO2tqOBRF2VKdIGXCGpa6F-21x8542Ngx0F7zx7zRivqDmG9mubl8DktykuJDmG7boPnUiiIFOGBAMi84bh2VwKLXelXf4sPqfX3cxyQXNv-wo7rfeOsx9htdmq-Q-AY23VCGLJst&c=FLl3ZUA5DlVz6H3jaQ5TYDap53xJQHGPb5DZvf7NjTJh6Lcp2wAFsw==&ch=JyzCb5B7KEdiJi0ux6zm1tR24H36tznZkLOTLIqghZhcLkYwbfLwnQ==)

clean_body: The choice is yours == " I'm lockstep with all progressives, no question about it" \- Rep. Tim Ryan (D-OH) Freedom or socialism? The choice is yours, Friend. Tim Ryan, Democratic candidate for Ohio's US Senate seat, is WAY too liberal for Ohio -- he has admitted that he's in lockstep with all progressives, even AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Nancy Pelosi. He's a proud supporter of open border policies and the Green New Deal, and, if elected, there 's no telling what other reckless, socialist ideas he would help to advance. If we're going to preserve our freedom, and defend our conservative values in Congress, we absolutely cannot let Ryan or any other Washington progressives come out ahead in this race. == | == While the Democrats rely on their dark money donors and coastal elite friends, I'm relying on the help of the grassroots. In order to defeat the Democrats and their massive war-chest, we need to meet EVERY single one of our fundraising goals. name: Marco Rubio
subject: President Trump is with me, are you Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
%%=v(@sFirstName)=%% -- I have some thoughts I need to share with you
|
---
| | | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012F5K3aAG3qJaGU-syd3-10b5eYchmHj2nvYL55vWDdZxDBdivndV7hlX6Ck3oXEkiV8paUB2YtPgsM0D8qELdzLw7P614JiaunuAsEA3Y_cB9x_-42zS9AjXYOeY_dmsuf_L9pQPPmsqMC9GrNnl90WuaUE1uFE0q86Wh6ur3qrvE0Xh0p1Yi5WhyHYEXHmBCnGbPhRSjPcNko3cWCoCiRFa5U7nMkWO-CBoYMW0QEBevq2dsLTpzjk07zPR8lQV8Z4-TCNY5lM76dsKRXU1QPumCNx7LKoJ45mnAUqjSN66DEaZ4BdlfdmcmdqHfnfRtEtqKrXa2Y67GJ1UkzfSlEmBO7OG9BxxX-8uXw4KGZeqc7slOXMnwAA6chxiFU59f40cxjeK_z8FvC4GWLbO0G0P3c8Mx7uCf7WV9NfweIzzVAdi4zUGWvwx_tM-_woP&c=9q3G8Opr2S7P49YiTcs0HKHdgTynMqXo5CmR9-pNlpaX31LJhj0fLg==&ch=FNfU6d3kcneLVz-YfNTqFKqNRX_NGxSw8pYx3kgMGQL74J4YpUVAIw== "Desk of Marco Rubio Image")
---
Friend -- I have some thoughts I need to share with you.

I am sure you know, but in case you missed it, President Trump officially endorsed me to represent Florida. This endorsement has done great things for my campaign, and we've seen a huge boost in momentum. However, this won't be the silver bullet for my campaign. We still need your help, Friend.

The Democrats have shown that they're highly motivated following President Trump's endorsement. They see it as an opportunity to attack my campaign. We all see right through their baseless attacks. They are ridiculous, but that doesn't mean the woke media won't continue to push the radical left's talking points and attacks against me. And then the Democrats will use these news clips in attack ads to "prove" their point.

I know that you see right through these attacks, right, Friend?

While the radical left wastes time by attacking me on air, I am hard at work serving the great people of Florida and America. I won't compromise my values or ever stop fighting for your conservative values, Friend. I will **NEVER** bend a knee to the woke mob or waiver in my staunch support of conservative America. Your voice always deserves to be heard, regardless of how hard liberal media and woke corporate companies like Facebook and Google attempt to censor and drown us out.

I will never stop fighting, Friend. Can I count on you to join?

Your support would mean the world to me. These attacks are not going to stop coming, we need you to stand strong with us against the radical left.

_**[Can I ask you to chip in $25 now? Donate before our April Deadline at midnight to keep us in this fight>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012F5K3aAG3qJaGU-syd3-10b5eYchmHj2nvYL55vWDdZxDBdivndV7hlX6Ck3oXEkiV8paUB2YtPgsM0D8qELdzLw7P614JiaunuAsEA3Y_cB9x_-42zS9AjXYOeY_dmsuf_L9pQPPmsqMC9GrNnl90WuaUE1uFE0q86Wh6ur3qrvE0Xh0p1Yi5WhyHYEXHmBCnGbPhRSjPcNko3cWCoCiRFa5U7nMkWO-CBoYMW0QEBevq2dsLTpzjk07zPR8lQV8Z4-TCNY5lM76dsKRXU1QPumCNx7LKoJ45mnAUqjSN66DEaZ4BdlfdmcmdqHfnfRtEtqKrXa2Y67GJ1UkzfSlEmBO7OG9BxxX-8uXw4KGZeqc7slOXMnwAA6chxiFU59f40cxjeK_z8FvC4GWLbO0G0P3c8Mx7uCf7WV9NfweIzzVAdi4zUGWvwx_tM-_woP&c=9q3G8Opr2S7P49YiTcs0HKHdgTynMqXo5CmR9-pNlpaX31LJhj0fLg==&ch=FNfU6d3kcneLVz-YfNTqFKqNRX_NGxSw8pYx3kgMGQL74J4YpUVAIw== "Can I ask you to chip in $25 now? **$25 is all we need from you to keep fighting and hit our goals for the month.** We need you to join us tonight, Friend. Without your support, I am worried that my campaign will have to start making some serious budgetary decisions. Things like field offices, yard signs, and even pizza for our volunteers will be a faint dream if we don't make this deadline.

Please step up and stand with me and President Trump.

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

Hi Friend, Our team is reaching out to top grassroots supporters with a quick survey from Young Kim. The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. body:
I wanted to check in quickly to update you on our End of Month goal. We have just a few hours to go before the deadline, but we’re still $582 short of our $10,000 grassroots goal.

| Hi Peter,

I wanted to check in quickly to update you on our End of Month goal. We have just a few hours to go before the deadline, but we’re still $582 short of our $10,000 grassroots goal.

If you are able, would you consider chipping in before midnight? _**[http://wildforcongress.com/GrassrootsGoal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28456254/283310859/325594774?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwNzA2Yy1kMmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CI1SL2CNZNT4n94o7gU40ktPrfTGLFittTZqe0b7Xw=&emci=c28cff9c-baa9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9c00706c-d2a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=5543981)**_

Believe me, Peter, I hate asking for your hard earned money. But if we’re going to stand a chance against the Republicans trying to buy this seat, we need the resources for a strong campaign.

If we reach our goal tonight, that means I can spend less time dialing for dollars and more time working for working families.

Even a small contribution, like $5 or $10, can make a big difference. Can I count on you to chip in before midnight? _**[http://wildforcongress.com/GrassrootsGoal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28456256/283310863/325594774?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwNzA2Yy1kMmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CI1SL2CNZNT4n94o7gU40ktPrfTGLFittTZqe0b7Xw=&emci=c28cff9c-baa9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9c00706c-d2a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=5543981) **_

Thank you,
_Susan_

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: We need to keep Mark Kelly in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460009/283322988/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg3OTlhZS1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w13gXKzZfBrfSYr3gRAwzWCYuvpJ8_xYlQcDijR3hxA=&emci=48ab802b-28a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=d68799ae-d9a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

| | Hi Derek — It's Mark Warner again, and **[I'm asking you to join me in supporting my friend Sen. Mark Kelly before tonight's critical fundraising deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460012/283322990/-1279336147?refcode=ris_20210430_e_f_us_na_na_markkellynd__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg3OTlhZS1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w13gXKzZfBrfSYr3gRAwzWCYuvpJ8_xYlQcDijR3hxA=)**. I hope you'll take a moment to let me explain why.
* Mark Kelly flipped his Arizona Senate seat blue in 2020, helping Democrats gain our razor-thin Senate majority. But because Mark was elected to serve out the remainder of the late Sen. John McCain's term, he's up for re-election again next year.

* If we lose Arizona, our chances of holding the Senate majority drop to just about zero.

* That's why D.C. Republicans and dark money groups are making Arizona a top target in 2022. The attack ads are already running, hitting Mark on his support for expanding voting rights.

**[The truth is, this is just the beginning. The GOP attacks will only get worse, and Mark Kelly needs our help now if he's going to hold this seat and defend the Senate majority. body:
We need to keep him in Congress to fight for working people.
#

Hi — did you see Mondaire’s email from earlier this week? **We’re $6,043 away from our $15,000 end-of-month goal,** and we need to hit it before TONIGHT at midnight to keep our campaign on track.
**[If you're able, please chip in whatever you can to help re-elect Mondaire. We need to keep him in Congress to fight for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460058/283323055/1974547766?refcode2=28cf16c3-d9a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNmMTZjMy1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TO7WbbUw4cb6T2sDHhTYlYvYnRHcE7tXJxJSWEIFeIA=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460059/283323057/1974547766?refcode2=28cf16c3-d9a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNmMTZjMy1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TO7WbbUw4cb6T2sDHhTYlYvYnRHcE7tXJxJSWEIFeIA=)**
**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our end-of-month deadline — which is this Friday. My team has set a goal to raise $15,000 by then.**
Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-april-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460060/283323058/1974547766?refcode2=28cf16c3-d9a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNmMTZjMy1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TO7WbbUw4cb6T2sDHhTYlYvYnRHcE7tXJxJSWEIFeIA=)**).
This has been a very important month for our movement. First, we introduced Policy is Personal PAC to help bold, progressive candidates who come from underrepresented communities fight back against big money and make our representative bodies truly reflective of the American people.
Then, we introduced the _Judiciary Act of 2021_. This bill would add 4 seats to the Supreme Court, immediately reversing the Republicans’ theft of the Court. Unsurprisingly, Republicans were angry — so much so that Tucker Carlson gave me a vile shoutout full of lies on his FOX News show.
The only way Republicans can hold on to power is if we let them get away with their brazen power grabs over the last several years, so they’re doing everything they can to stop our movement from leveling the playing field.
Then at the end of last week, the House passed legislation to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state and give the 700,000+ Americans living there — most of whom are Black and brown — a say in our democracy.
I have had enough of Republicans’ racist insinuations that the people of Washington, D.C. are somehow unworthy of voting representation in Congress.
Republicans have only bad-faith arguments for denying D.C. statehood — for example, Senator Tom Cotton said D.C. wouldn’t be a “well-rounded, working-class state” like Wyoming. I had no idea there were so many syllables in the word “white.”
Our movement is just getting started, and I am working overtime to pass progressive policies that give working Americans the opportunity to thrive, not just survive.
But in order to keep up this fight, I have to ensure that my re-election campaign has the funds it needs to fight off any primary challengers. Last cycle, the primary field included a self-funded billionaire trying to buy this seat. We have to prepare for that to happen again.
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $15,000 end-of-month goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities in Congress, not fundraising for re-election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460062/283323059/1974547766?refcode2=28cf16c3-d9a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNmMTZjMy1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TO7WbbUw4cb6T2sDHhTYlYvYnRHcE7tXJxJSWEIFeIA=)**
This movement is making a lot of people scared, because they are realizing that their white supremacist politics are no longer popular throughout the country. Together, we’ll end that kind of politics for good, but only if we all fight for it.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28460063/283323060/1974547766?refcode2=28cf16c3-d9a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNmMTZjMy1kOWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TO7WbbUw4cb6T2sDHhTYlYvYnRHcE7tXJxJSWEIFeIA=)**
* * *

body:
With each week that goes by, I’m more and more grateful to live in a state led by Governor Eric Holcomb and other Republican office holders. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470418?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Stark Contrasts**_ Wednesday night brought home another stark reminder of the differences between Indiana and Washington DC. I am grateful to live in a state led by Governor Holcomb and other Republican office holders. As for Joe Biden’s speech to Congress earlier this week? Yikes. It seems that whenever his handlers allow him to make public appearances, Biden goes further and further to the left. This is a party dominated by Pelosi, Schumer, the Squad and a host of other socialists. Just look back at what was said on Wednesday. Apparently the Trojan Horse “COVID relief” package and the everything-the-left-wants-is-infrastructure “infrastructure plan” just wasn’t enough reckless spending for Biden and his socialist handlers. What we heard Wednesday amounts to trillions of dollars in reckless spending and billions of dollars in tax increases. The Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda is a reckless sell out to the far left.

Here in Indiana we balance budgets, cut taxes, and take care of important issues that impact Hoosiers. I did get a bit of a chuckle from the hapless Indiana Democrats this week. It seems they’re desperate to take credit for the superb leadership Governor Holcomb has displayed throughout the pandemic. Keep in mind, this is the group that attacked Holcomb every step of the way during COVID, wanted massive business shutdowns, and still want our schools closed to in-person learning. In reality, the recently completed legislative session was a transformational one for Hoosiers, thanks to Gov. Holcomb and Republican legislative leaders. We have more information on the session below, but Indiana is paying down debt, paying cash for projects, keeping taxes and regulations low and investing in Hoosiers, communities, teachers and students unlike ever before. Compare that with the reckless spending in Washington and you have stark contrasts between responsible governing and divisive leftism. Between reality, data-driven leadership and fantasyland politics.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer speaking with WISH TV in Indianapolis earlier this week_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb** joined Toyota executives to announce the addition of two electric vehicles to its production line at the Princeton facility. This will be supported by by an $803 million investment and the creation of 1,400 new jobs! Indiana is home to the highest concentration of manufacturing jobs in the nation, and our pool of talented Hoosiers will ensure that companies continue to invest in Indiana and create good jobs for Hoosiers. Under **Governor Holcomb's** leadership, Indiana has broken economic development & jobs records year after year.
_**“Toyota has been an incredible partner to the state of Indiana for nearly 25 years, and we're thrilled to continue that partnership in order to drive our economy forward." -Governor Holcomb**_
**Governor Holcomb** also joined the Economic Club of Indiana as the speaker for their April luncheon. He provided updates about a variety of topics that are impacting Hoosiers, including our record breaking economic development investments. Watch the full video here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TNHXBT_L4qY](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e02b230639&e=1acd9bb3d6)
_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb speaks at the Economic Club of Indiana's April Lunch via Zoom._
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer on HR 1**_ Chairman Hupfer shared some thoughts on HR 1 with members of the RNC and Fox News. HR 1 is nothing short of a Democrat hijacking of our elections process and we can’t let it happen.

Read more here: [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/rnc-exec-dems-hr-1-hostile-takeover-election-process](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e88282cb29&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Session Highlights**_ The 2021 Indiana General Assembly went into recess last week, closing the page on a truly “transformational” session. Here are some highlights of the session:

* **Responsible, conservative fiscal management**
* The state budget is continues Indiana’s conservative fiscal management. This budget is balanced. It preserves our triple-A credit rating. It restores our rainy day fund. **It pays off a lot of debt** , saving Hoosiers from future interest payments.
* Budget will also infuse the pre-1996 teacher pension fund with $600m and unemployment insurance trust fund with $500m.
* Able **to pay cash for major projects** like state archive building, new campuses for the School for the Deaf and School for the Blind & Visually Impaired, two new state park inns, enhanced cyber security infrastructure, new state police post and lab, etc.
* **_Indiana weathered the COVID-19 economic storm, and now we’re roaring back because of the leadership of Governor Holcomb and our Republican legislators_**

* **Unprecedented investments in education**
* The state budget **prioritizes education** and supports our students, parents and teachers like never before.
* 50% of general fund appropriations are dedicated to K-12 education
* Expands the nation’s best school choice program.
* Fulfills recommendations of Governor Holcomb’s [teacher compensation commission.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8fd4b503fd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* Allocates **$1.9 billion in NEW money** for K-12 education, increases K-12 tuition support by $1.03 billion.
* **Supports Job Creators and Economic Development**
* Governor Holcomb’s regional economic acceleration and development initiative (READI) was created to spur regional cooperation that will enhance communities and spur population growth.
* In 2020, **Gov. Holcomb and the IEDC set a job attraction record—during a global pandemic** —and will look to break that record again in 2021.
* **Next Level Agenda**
* Governor Holcomb was also able to get through a number of key items from his [2021 Next Level Agenda:](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f932428507&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* The creation of READI Grants.
* COVID liability protections for schools and businesses
* Comprehensive law enforcement reform package passed house and senate unanimously.
* Provides body cams for officers, reviews law enforcement training, etc.
* [Expands broadband development](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b64333429a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* Keeps permanent the approved use of electronic meetings and signatures for state business.
* Pregnancy Accommodations for expecting mothers.
* The governor also signed [an executive order](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2646568254&e=1acd9bb3d6) expanding pregnancy accommodations for state employees.
* Keeps permanent the use of telehealth services.
* **_“Telehealth is a win for everyone—care providers have fewer missed visits, patients reduce their travel time for care, and public health improves,” Governor Holcomb._**

---
|
---
| _**Holcomb: A Steady Hand at the Wheel**_ Check out this Letter to the Editor from Floyd County Commissioner Shawn Carruthers. [https://www.newsandtribune.com/opinion/letter-gov-holcomb-a-steady-hand-at-the-wheel/article_d125b272-a5bf-11eb-832b-2384dc7a9748.html](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c98d2f284&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer on WOWO**_ Chairman Kyle Hupfer was on Fort Wayne’s WOWO with Kayla Blakeslee earlier this week. Kyle discussed some major Republican wins for the 2021 session. You can listen to the interview here: [https://www.wowo.com/several-gop-wins-from-latest-indiana-legislative-session/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=122db67c74&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**RNC Statement on Joe Biden's Joint Address**_ Republican National Committee (RNC) Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel released the following statement on Joe Biden's joint address:
**_“Joe Biden’s first 100 days in office have been an unqualified failure, including unprecedented attacks on energy workers, a humanitarian crisis at the border, and an America-last foreign policy agenda. Then there is his hyper-partisanship, as he and Democrats attempt to abolish the filibuster, pack the Supreme Court, and force through their H.R. 1 power grab. In his inaugural address, Biden called for unity. That was a lie, and our nation is worse off and more divided thanks to Joe Biden."_**
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[May 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b38cb4e5e7&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2021 IFRW Spring Luncheon
[May 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=54f6f26935&e=1acd9bb3d6): Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner
[May 6](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6101d8773c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Vermillion County Lincoln Day Dinner
[May 18](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e7cdc9e0d5&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County Lincoln Day Gala Event

**Senator Mike Braun **[concerned with Biden's "infrastructure" spending plan](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=97db992783&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: An Ally and a Progressive Champion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UVw-8gZmpO7Bj1YJnQKAiKAHf29WqVT8ZNrR5pHAfKU=/u0esfGgUO6VMJauTjtmuAkDY5oY_5CHtR5CNUUaluSw=)
---
Friend, Alfonso Lopez has been an ally since I first served in Virginia's State Senate. In addition to my admiration of him as a friend, Delegate Lopez continues to earn my respect and admiration as a lawmaker. His ability to deliver progressive results has done a great deal to better our Commonwealth, and right now he needs our help. [Will you consider making a donation to his campaign and support an effective Virginia Democrat that gets things done? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/UVw-8gZmpO7Bj1YJnQKAiKAHf29WqVT8ZNrR5pHAfKU=/u0esfGgUO6VMJauTjtmuAkDY5oY_5CHtR5CNUUaluSw=) As a leader in the House Democratic Majority, Delegate Lopez helped set a progressive agenda this past session. He also passed each and every one of the bills he introduced - and I've signed all of them into law. Including: 1) Addressing the problematic gun sale 'default proceed' or 'Charleston Loophole', 2) Providing Dreamer Students with the opportunity to receive Financial Aid, and 3) Creating the first statewide LGBTQ+ Advisory Board in the South. Virginia needs leaders like Alfonso, and right now Republicans want nothing more than to take him out. Progressive leaders like him are the far-right GOP's worst nightmare, and we need to have his back. Indeed, Republicans are furiously raising money, hoping to #MakeVirginiaRedAgain - and we can't let them roll back the progress we've made. Will you join me in supporting Delegate Lopez right now and make a donation to his campaign? Together let's #KeepVirginiaBlue!! Take care, Ralph

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/UVw-8gZmpO7Bj1YJnQKAiKAHf29WqVT8ZNrR5pHAfKU=/s1NS8IVrHZPioSXTSopt7to-pvfGsvLStlQO6E4wakM=) |

body:

name: Mike Pence
subject: I’m concerned...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are actively trying to pack the Supreme Court with Liberal Justices and they've PASSED D.C. Statehood in the House!

Democrats have stated time and time again that they will do everything in their power to make sure Republicans never hold power ever again. Fellow American, I'm concerned that this time around they really mean it.

**They are actively trying to pack the Supreme Court with Liberal Justices and they 've PASSED D.C. Statehood in the House!**

That's why it's absolutely CRITICAL that my Senate Allies meet their end of month goal. If they FALL SHORT, it will be almost IMPOSSIBLE to stop the Democrats.

**[**TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_mike-pence_t1060825-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_im-concerned...)**
---

The majority is just ONE seat away...don't let that escape your grasp. It's urgent that you step up TODAY.

[](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_mike-pence_t1060825-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_im-concerned...)
**[**TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_mike-pence_t1060825-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_im-concerned...)**

Thankful for all your help,

Mike Pence

name: Senator Molly Baumgardner
subject: Derek Schmidt is a Proven Fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Molly Baumgardner here. I represent Kansas’ 37th district as a state senator, and today I want to tell you why I’m endorsing Derek Schmidt for Governo Friend, Molly Baumgardner here. I represent Kansas’ 37th district as a state senator, and today I want to tell you why I’m endorsing Derek Schmidt for Governor of Kansas. **Derek is a proven fighter for children and families.** I’m a fourth generation educator who taught at the high school level for seven years, and I now serve as the communications coordinator at Johnson County Community College. As the current chair of the State Senate Education Committee, I always fight for what’s best for our Kansas students. And I’m here to tell you that Derek Schmidt does too–He’s proven it over his many years of service to our state and its children. **Derek will stand up for our rural communities.** Derek was once a state senator like myself. He knows the ins and outs of our legislature. While he was in the Senate, Derek served as chairman of the Senate Agriculture Committee. He’s seen the priorities of Kansas farmers and ranchers and knows how to fight for them. **Derek Schmidt is a proven fighter for the unborn.** As Attorney General, Derek Schmidt has defended pro-life laws against legal challenges and argued that no right to abortion exists under the Kansas Constitution. This year, I’ve led the fight for the Value Them Both amendment in the Kansas Senate, making way for basic abortion regulations to protect the lives of babies and mothers throughout our state. I know how valuable the right to life is and so does Derek. Friend, if you think Derek Schmidt is perfect for governor of our state like I do, would you consider joining our team? We need a strong group of loyal supporters who will help support Derek as he braves the fight for governor. [**JOIN OUR TEAM**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=789cf4005f2a464bab8379ece1c21959&_e=A8T16JmxyLV7oFjvXpp-2tBsm_R5yJ2srXz-yORURm2mvVdvD5b9GKVa6jQfGhLrTczvjbgap3jWuVIrbcdrNpn_kkHr6iqZJX8DtnGHQNN192HBpX4OUsfI7VN-l8KEv5LoiQz3E4GA-P_Vv-xI33mNzQiK4H2t-rW2w44S5hWxnWrfEEwdUp1hyicnFVHMHy2HtS1KvgMy4xBndpHaFOUBfj0Jha2tML3oMaLKBfXQRJTB0EueKWCDChGAMoKJHHPm4ODeIc--cyFUd75bgOA5YXPvTvr6MjU5HxNz7kI92zYw7gQPVsM1C30N25iIX4nqP7DqxyavzEKk2jrc7jev0NJmrqyKQ5Nin5z26jhAaeAPOkTpGoItBSKVb9INrRkSJ_LvchAUTYgvpQBI_gWm-lf2MwtyHcoF0OWdFTbvKQrd3Tkx8EFmHDSeVNcj) Derek Schmidt has the experience and the conservative values to lead Kansas as our governor. He is a proven fighter, and is ready to stand up to Laura Kelly and defend our freedoms and our way of life. Friend, we’re looking for more folks to join our team to spread the word. I trust Derek will lead our state well, and we want to make sure the rest of Kansas knows too. **[If you want to know more about Derek's campaign and get involved, click here.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=789cf4005f2a464bab8379ece1c21959&_e=A8T16JmxyLV7oFjvXpp-2tBsm_R5yJ2srXz-yORURm2mvVdvD5b9GKVa6jQfGhLrTczvjbgap3jWuVIrbcdrNpn_kkHr6iqZJX8DtnGHQNN192HBpX4OUsfI7VN-l8KEv5LoiQz3E4GA-P_Vv-xI33mNzQiK4H2t-rW2w44S5hWxnWrfEEwdUp1hyicnFVHM-D4EE5vwJQ4BqzQOg_jowOp_ZEpG9zWWcSJ3rOpGIQVYZkPfG10Ea2-qf2-7tDFOzBSaOdqUXVs4VzYvkVu70i9iyL3N4LEReuMxBwXM-4bv_Y-VNuKMgvjHvftUsdHpsReW6wD_ZvUXdqJRVKn3xG7ka7MKd_Mr-t66qTfdIqD0iyGfxOG8zA-EpfyjGCumdxOyF9XpEuIfXPxet9Q2W1U0mOSKzmD5I74EqELwA7sRBg4G63VV8c9iYH-h-phm) ** Thanks for your time. With your help, I’m confident we can elect Derek Schmidt as Governor of Kansas next year. Molly Baumgardner | |

Hi Peter -- this is a quick note, so I hope you’ll give it a read before midnight.

I have been emailing a lot asking you to chip in to my campaign (and I’m going to ask again), so it’s only fair that I tell you why I think I’m the right person to represent CA-25 in Congress.

I’m running for Congress because I believe that no one should be discriminated against for who they are or who they love. Because our planet will not survive without drastic action to save it. Because public school teachers and students deserve more support than they get. Because health care is a right for all, not a privilege for those who can pay.

**I’m running because the moment Mike Garcia sided with insurrectionists over our democracy, he became unfit to serve in any capacity -- and someone needed to stand up and run to send him packing.**

If this is a campaign you can get behind, please consider chipping in before our April fundraising deadline at midnight. We still need to raise $3,022 and could really use your help: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2104_email_christy_eom?refcode=eom4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28463923/283335124/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210430_eom4-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDIyMjE0Yy1lM2E5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pwkuA44BlbiS1HClmF9syujoASNRRTh80P2ra4rU0M=)**

Thanks for all your support,

Christy

Democrats in Congress are pushing some of the most radical policies in our country’s history:

**➡️ H.R.1. ➡️ Packing the Supreme Court. ➡️ Making Washington D.C. A State.**

__**[I’m not gonna lie.](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=6a31ea372f334b0e8bf9ab976dbed955&_e=GVC9pDVVOnidPcLFYMKt4d0-YMBIekwNVPUO-mimlA5wWxmZmjsMeQr2wS80JYNWvIKwZa4TgORfh8gwz6kt6W-1WHdeEM2Bpb5y0pxtNju6A_MZdHoEOwwP_vfViVNcQDzQXK9oQhtdV5PJH9wfMoKY37CP0-fRGrEKS4jgFuzQtR-F0_PfcbvSBhlYhbG5OIOR7djQYnNId7bctw51agaezefgqOI9sYyFZY1s6ovrMC7QifdF-6OAoyXYyFRq5_JZuqyNwq0ppLlssRbO458q-8LYY97JZMwxFi4hjHwdTV2MdnLhp4m-oN5CRqBjvBJbR-4fKp-0xchCwyVFf53yhD80kzQF5MVbzQuwP7mSewvBr1UhM3y1U7b1tMwbyP4Bs_NGFmIxkzkGlf-tG0NanaWX05b0upBrT0MqGWdnNjdc2F6VQwBfXxv83oMEE-2S-5bcg54225hR8X9jmcB8sG4dXph6GYdRyvYFGc334HV9mQq-ax7oAx-ZwyhP)**__

name: Vice President Mike Pence
subject: If we sit on the sidelines, they will destroy the very foundation of our country and make sure Conservatives never win an election again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is far beyond partisan politics. This is an attempt to destroy the foundation of our political system.

Biden and the Democrats have been in power for 4 months now and I don't believe anyone could have predicted how boldly extreme the Left's policy agenda would be.

So far the Democrat Controlled Congress has:
* **Introduced a bill to add 4 Liberal Justices to the Supreme Court. **
* **Passed D.C. Statehood in the House.**

[**This is far beyond partisan politics. This is an attempt to destroy the foundation of our political system. **](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_vice-president-mike-pence_t1060822-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_if-we-sit-on-the-sidelines-they-will-destroy-the-very-foundation-of-our-country-and-make-sure-conservatives-never-win-an-election-again.)

Schumer and Pelosi can't stand that the Trump Administration and Senate Republicans successfully secured a conservative majority on the Supreme Court. So they've decided to overturn the board and redo the system so that Conservatives never win again.

If we sit on the sidelines, they will destroy the very foundation upon which our country was founded all so they can ram through their far left liberal agenda.

We MUST retake the Senate if we are to keep their extremist agenda in check and that begins by helping Senate Republicans reach their End of Month Deadline.

[](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_vice-president-mike-pence_t1060822-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_if-we-sit-on-the-sidelines-they-will-destroy-the-very-foundation-of-our-country-and-make-sure-conservatives-never-win-an-election-again.)
_****_
**[**RETAKE THE SENATE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_vice-president-mike-pence_t1060822-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_if-we-sit-on-the-sidelines-they-will-destroy-the-very-foundation-of-our-country-and-make-sure-conservatives-never-win-an-election-again.)**
---
_****_
We cannot afford to fail now.

Please help us reach our goal before this deadline. The consequences of failing to act would be devastating.

Vice President Mike Pence

**[**RETAKE THE SENATE**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mike-pence-deadline/?sc=pem51028m13m&utm_campaign=20210430_TY-2.101720_vice-president-mike-pence_t1060822-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210430_if-we-sit-on-the-sidelines-they-will-destroy-the-very-foundation-of-our-country-and-make-sure-conservatives-never-win-an-election-again.)**

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: As much as I hate to ask...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
We have so much work to do. It won't be possible without electing more progressive women like Katie and without your support to help us get there. Hi Peter, It's Simona--Founder and Executive Director of Moms in Office and Mom in Chief of the Moms for Katie Porter outreach. I will keep this short. Our end of the month fundraising deadline is tonight and right now is the absolute best time to split a contribution between Katie Porter and Moms in Office. As much as I hate to ask, Democrats like you are the reason for our success and with your help, we could elect more progressive women like Katie Porter to fight for us in Congress. [**The National Republican Congressional Committee already announced their 2022 targets, Katie's name was on that list.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28464870/283337879/1834377524?refcode=0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyZWQ1OWU0LWU1YTktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TA5jsgy5aXu3Ag5dYtEqRsxVrOleHyxvIWHKR3iSzls=) The GOP is raising massive amounts of money to take this seat back and we simply can't wait to act until 2022. [**Peter, Katie needs your help before our fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28464872/283337880/1834377524?refcode=0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyZWQ1OWU0LWU1YTktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TA5jsgy5aXu3Ag5dYtEqRsxVrOleHyxvIWHKR3iSzls=) Katie's district has a Republican voter registration advantage and our House majority could not be more vulnerable. **[I am going to keep this brief--we need you to chip in what you can before midnight tonight. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: It’s safe to say we can’t afford to fall short of this goal...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hi, there — it’s Emma Brown, Mark’s Campaign Manager.
I know you’ve heard from Mark, and our Finance Director, Lily, but I wanted to reach out because we need your help to hit our April fundraising deadline before midnight tonight.
Our goal is to get 35,000 contributions, and I was looking over the numbers this morning and we still have a little bit of work to do to get there — 1,019 donations to be exact.
Hitting this goal is so important because just this week a Super PAC pledged to spend $10 million to defeat us in next year’s Arizona Senate race.
**So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to fall short of this goal. Mark needs our help to hold this seat. So here’s the part where I ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of this goal, not when National Republicans are already planning on spending millions to defeat us.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?refcode=em210430-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=536_6688874_OXhQmw&akid=536%2E6688874%2EOXhQmw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210430-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=536_6688874_OXhQmw&akid=536%2E6688874%2EOXhQmw) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210430-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=536_6688874_OXhQmw&akid=536%2E6688874%2EOXhQmw)

---|---

I can’t thank you enough for standing with Mark.
Once we’ve wrapped up this deadline, I’ll be back in touch with more on what’s next for us. So stay tuned and thank you for being a part of this team, it means so much to Mark and to all of us on Team Kelly.
Full speed ahead!
Emma Brown

Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: , Do you believe "Fewer Taxes are Better"
body:
| |
