| Local Polticians Angered Over Lower Taxes
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
##### April 30, 2021
## "Fewer Taxes are Better" Rep. Brady Williamson
(This article originally appeared in [The Panolian](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjc1MzYxMTE3MTg4MTM1MTU1JmM9bTVwMiZlPTAmYj01ODczMzU3ODMmZD12OHY1ZTVm.uGgZAmHYnOcE2RghqlY_r9CV0hiSy_AXtDwyuj7rTyY) on April 28, 2021)
_By Rep. Brady Williamson_
If you didn’t read last Wednesday’s article by [Jeremy Weldon, “Rep. Williamson railed against at local board meetings,”](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjc1MzYxMTE3MTg4MTM1MTU1JmM9bTVwMiZlPTAmYj01ODczMzU3ODYmZD1uMno3czZh.DSJDeu6HAxeJBEu8NmbxQp0UEkdqc7aiwIeIMUDulYU) please do. It’s 100% true. When I ran for State Representative, I promised that I would fight against taxes and big government, and that is exactly what I have done. It is no surprise that my position has angered some politicians who want more government funding. It’s not the first loud and childish attacks by individuals that think a tax or bigger government is the answer to a concern. These guys say, “some taxes are good,” but I say fewer taxes is better. And, although taxes are sometimes spent well on core functions of government, that is not the case here.
Being a Representative has held me to a higher degree of accountability, because it’s not for me, it’s for so many I represent. And in this case it’s a community that proves it can do more with $1 than the government can do with $10. Like a Sardis Lake Church that funds their mission trips with an annual garage sale, and like Sardis Lake Fire Department that has purchased a couple fire trucks, among other things, with Bingo proceeds.
If Burns BBQ or The Pier restaurant wants to take 3% off the top of their own business and put it in their own account, they are free to do so. But, I do not believe they should be mandated to take that same 3%, give it to the City (over and above sales tax and property taxes), and hope the City spends it well. That’s their money, and they are taxed enough already.
It’s apparent these individuals view me as an enemy. I’m still convinced they are not my enemy, but they just don’t know how to handle a politician who both makes transparent promises and then follows through. As a Christian, however flawed and full of sin I am, I still view them as neighbors and brothers with just very different views on Government’s core functions, budget concerns, and tax.
But, as your elected representative, I also view them as competitors to the voice of those I represent. They told me “You have committed political suicide” for voting against a wasteful tax spent as a slush fund with zero audit or accountability and for voting against a 5,000 page, $350,000,000 debt bill. Well, that’s just a risk I’ll have to take.
This is not combat, and they are not my enemies, they are just competition for your voice. And I love my competition. Any attack, whether public or private, forces people to fall back on their foundations, to rely on the things that have formed them the most. For me, its wisdom given to us through the Bible which I often fail. And the principles of combat I learned through being an Army Combat Engineer, Sapper Company Platoon Leader, XO, and Combat Engineer Company Commander whose purpose is to funnel the enemy into a time and space where they have superior advantage, breach and place minefields, place and overcome obstacles, and the like.
I was fortunate enough to go thru Army Engineer Captains course twice which is another story. In representing you, I also turn to my accounting background, and now that I’m back in the military with our Mississippi Army National Guard my occupation is as an Officer overseeing contracts for supplies and services; writing, reviewing, implementing Government contracts. Before I was elected or even thought of running, I was a small business owner, and I still am. Have been for twenty-five years. I am a former member of the Association for Governmental Accountants, and I understand audits, because I’ve studied them, painfully, and applied them in more ways than one.
I am more than happy to put my economic analyses of these issues up against a few politicians clamoring for more government dollars. These guys tell me that “taxes are good” or “you are damaging our community,” and they compare my fighting against taxes to being a cattle thief. Milton Friedman famously said, “Hell hath no fury like a bureaucrat scorned,” and I knew what I was doing when I touched the golden goose of these taxes.
On the note of Cattle, I’m very happy to say Pitcock Meats has been approved by the USDA for full Processing. This provides the ability to process meats for sale everywhere, Grocery stores, in state lines, and across state lines. This is HUGE for our cattle farmers. The equivalent of a new Sawmill for our Tree Farmers. You can support Pitcock right now by bringing your cattle there for custom processing between now and November when their USDA facility opens. Bring your cattle for custom processing now.
Back to the point: I have cast every single vote with these questions in mind: Am I voting with consistency? Am I doing what I promised the voters who elected me? If I don’t, they will hold me accountable, and rightly so. I ran on a platform of keeping taxes as low as possible, and this tax that I killed was among the most wasteful, least accountable, un-audited taxes I saw during Session.
And, although it may have been presented as a path to create projects you and I both would enjoy, taxes like this end up spent poorly and waste your and my money. I do not support that type of government spending. It’s wrong.
Every project we start is not a one-time expense but an ever recurring cost, so we have to careful not to increase the cost of living for my constituents, and put the State, Batesville, and Panola County further in debt. I promised to fight against all of these things, and my constituents trust me to do that. I have remained consistent in that fight throughout my term.
This vote is merely part of that. Those “railing against” me will give you lots of stats and promises, like all good salesmen, but it always boils down to this: “give us more of your money and let us decide what is best for you.” If my opponents were shocked by my vote, let me say it again: I am against big government. I am against higher taxes. I am against going into further debt, and so are the people who voted for me. No matter what they say, the fact of the matter is this: raising taxes simply doesn’t work. You can call it a special sales tax or a tourism tax or a good tax, but higher taxes are still not the answer.
The City of Jackson has among the highest sales and property taxes in the state, and it has a tourism tax to boot.. They don’t have roads fit to drive, clean water, or sewer that is fit.
My opponents mentioned the Concourse. Funded by appropriations, this would be a reasonable use of our budgeted funds, and I support it. But this all got changed by savvy politicians. Eventually, the money to pay for that, it was decided, was to come from a $350 million bond, which is just another word for debt. Nearly every project in the all-encompassing two bond bills totaling around $700,000,000 should have come from money we had the last two years instead of money we borrow. This would/did saddle our citizens with debt for years to come. Instead, we borrowed and raised nearly every State budget.
That is a problem in my opinion. (Secretary of State, Michael Watson reduced his budget)
Further, the Concourse debt, which you would pay the note on, was moved into a five inch thick bill, with just a page or two on the Concourse. Unfortunately, a vote is all or nothing, and I did then and now do oppose that type of government debt, even if it means not getting something nice that we would like to have.
Most just vote for these bills because they are attached emotionally to the small piece that’s in it for their district or believe they will please their districts by bringing home stolen or borrowed money. I am not attached to any special interest project enough to tie it to debt or continued excess tax. I will not sacrifice my promises to you, the voters, just to please local politicians wanting to build pet projects.
Finally, I was promised that the standard procedure ensured that an audit of the tax-funded expenditures would be in my hands before the bill even came up for a vote. This did not happen. The committee chair and I have met and gives me every reason trust his word moving forward. Many of the loudest voices crying for more taxes have no interest in the public knowing where all the money actually goes. But, I do.
The Supervisors can campaign for my future opponents as John Thomas did; Aldermen can claim that cutting taxes is “trying to hurt” Batesville – as Stan Harrison did; but I don’t lose sleep over this.
I made you all promises, and I intend to keep them.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Local Polticians Angered Over Lower Taxes | | | | | | | | ---|--- April 30, 2021 "Fewer Taxes are Better" Rep. Brady Williamson (This article originally appeared in on April 28, 2021) By Rep. Brady Williamson If you didn’t read last Wednesday’s article by please do. It’s 100% true. When I ran for State Representative, I promised that I would fight against taxes and big government, and that is exactly what I have done. It is no surprise that my position has angered some politicians who want more government funding. It’s not the first loud and childish attacks by individuals that think a tax or bigger government is the answer to a concern. These guys say, “some taxes are good,” but I say fewer taxes is better. And, although taxes are sometimes spent well on core functions of government, that is not the case here. Being a Representative has held me to a higher degree of accountability, because it’s not for me, it’s for so many I represent. And in this case it’s a community that proves it can do more with $1 than the government can do with $10. Like a Sardis Lake Church that funds their mission trips with an annual garage sale, and like Sardis Lake Fire Department that has purchased a couple fire trucks, among other things, with Bingo proceeds. If Burns BBQ or The Pier restaurant wants to take 3% off the top of their own business and put it in their own account, they are free to do so. But, I do not believe they should be mandated to take that same 3%, give it to the City (over and above sales tax and property taxes), and hope the City spends it well. body:
The consensus is clear...

| | |

Friend, it's Ron DeSantis. Last night I joined a Republican Governor Town hall on Fox News and wanted to share some key takeaways with you.

Firstly - GOP governors got this right. For months we faced pressure from the liberal media, and intimidation from high profile Democrats to implement oppressive policies that stripped Americans of their constitutional rights. We refused and we were right.

Second - Red states are leading our economic recovery. Right now blue states are watching as millions flee their states in search of economic freedom.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: See my Washington Times Op-Ed and tv interview - Biden's Border Mess Escalates
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=c2296cffff&u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6b7dd1780d)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this email finds you well.

As someone who legally immigrated to this great country, I am proud that we are a nation built by immigrants. We are also a nation of laws and our laws must be respected. Unfortunately, the Biden administration is expanding on the failed immigration policies of the Obama Administration by opening our southern border and allowing for amnesty. This week, _The Washington Times_ published my op-ed on this topic.

[https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2021/apr/28/bidens-border-mess-escalates/](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=628a0647a8&e=c2296cffff "Biden's border mess escalates")

As we watch the crisis worsen daily on our southern border, Speaker Pelosi and Congressional Democrats passed two bills in the House just last month that would grant amnesty to over 4 million undocumented illegals. All of this could have been avoided had President Biden kept in place the border policies under former President Trump.

Let's face it: Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are asleep at the switch and have failed in their duty to protect our homeland. This administration has allowed the highest number of illegal crossings in 20 years to occur on its watch. Six times the number of unaccompanied migrant children entered our southern border in March 2021-- some 19,000 versus 3,000 last March.

When you see failures like this, you know why our Founding Fathers intended for a check and balance system on our government which we currently lack in Washington that is solely controlled by Democrats.

So what's the solution? Elect conservative candidates in 2022 who can win Congressional seats. Period.

We must regain control of the House and Senate and fire Pelosi and Schumer from their majority leadership positions.

We are only five seats shy in the House, and one seat shy in the Senate. This MUST be done so we can stop President Biden's Executive Orders and stop his radical spending bills from becoming law.

---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d664e62135&e=c2296cffff)
---
**On Newsmax TV, March 26, 2021,******_I discuss the Democrats' amnesty and open border policies._
|
---
|
#
* * *

I would love to hear your thoughts on this! Please feel free to email me directly. Also, to see my television appearances on a variety of political topics, please follow me on:
**Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki**

Thank you!
Amanda Makki
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends --
I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a donation to support my campaign and Maggie Hassan's. But before I ask, I first want to express my gratitude for all you've done to get us to this moment.
Thanks to your efforts last year, we brought real change to Congress. And I'm amazed by the grassroots energy we're continuing to see from people wanting to improve lives. Because you helped Maggie Hassan win her narrow race in 2016, she was able to help protect health care reform and preserve health care for the most vulnerable Americans. And because you helped elect me to secure a narrow Senate majority, we have delivered relief to millions of American families during the COVID crisis.
But as we've known all along, the election was just a beginning. The real work begins now, and it has never been more urgent for us to deliver change for the people.
But National Republicans have made clear they are bent on taking back our vulnerable Senate seats in Arizona and New Hampshire. That's why your support is so important and why today I have to ask:
[**If you 're able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaigns? The amount isn't as important as the donation itself because it's going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and fight for change.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc824/2a380d31/265c7050/f00f67/274760010/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA0MzBfa2VsbHlfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210430_kelly_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc824/2a380d31/265c7050/f00f60/274760010/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA0MzBfa2VsbHlfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210430_kelly_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc824/2a380d31/265c7050/f00f61/274760010/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA0MzBfa2VsbHlfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210430_kelly_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc824/2a380d31/265c7050/f00f62/274760010/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA0MzBfa2VsbHlfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210430_kelly_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc824/2a380d31/265c7050/f00f67/274760010/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA0MzBfa2VsbHlfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210430_kelly_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
I'm going to check back in over the course of the month to update you on our progress. I'm hopeful that with your support we can build campaigns that are successful in improving the lives of people from coast to coast.
I can't thank you enough for all of the hard work you've put into fighting for lasting change. It means the world to me to have so many of you supporting us and the fight for our shared values.
Full speed ahead!
-- Mark

clean_body: With such a short time left, we really need to step up our game NOW to make sure we reach it. Can you chip in now to make sure we make it? Friend, I reached out to you earlier this week because my team and I set a major goal that we need to reach before our end of month deadline: 100 new donors by midnight TONIGHT. With such a short time left, we really need to step up our game NOW to make sure we reach it. Can you chip in now to make sure we make it? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Friend, I know we’ve all got a lot on our plates right now - but it's more important than ever that we stand up to the politics as usual and advocate for real Americans. I’m tired of the same-old, same-old Washington tricks. And I know you are, too! We need Congress to work for the people! That’s what I pledged to do when I ran for office, and it’s what I’m doing every day. We’ve made great progress towards our goal already but we just can't afford to come up short. That’s why I wanted to check in with you to see if you could chip in now to our END OF MONTH money bomb? If you can, please chip in now before 11:59PM to help keep us on track! You can use this secure link to make an immediate MONEY BOMB donation: Thank you in advance. Your support means a lot to me! Nancy Mace \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Nancy Mace Subject: are you tired of the lies? To: END OF MONTH DEADLINE: APRIL 30TH @ 11:59PM 65 DONORS SHORT OF OUR GOALS Friend, the way I see it we have two choices when it comes to handling Washington politicians... We can accept the doublespeak, the half-truths, and all the ineffectiveness that comes with partisan politics as usual... OR We can stand up for ourselves and make Congress what it should be: the voice of the people! I’ve made my choice, friend. I want to work for YOU, not the status quo. But that’s exactly why the left is resisting me at every turn. I’m under attack by AOC, the media, even CODE PINK. These liberal elites don’t like that I’m fighting for REAL solutions instead of joining them to further divide America. But I will not be intimidated... I made a promise before I was elected to make Washington work again and I plan on keeping it. But I need your help to do it. Right now, we’re just 65 donors short of our goal for our April fundraising deadline. Can you chip in now to make sure we make it to keep us going? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. I hope you can chip in and help keep up our work to change Washington - for the better! Thank you for your support, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Jayla Gilliam, Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: A quick campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Unlike other establishment campaigns in this primary, we’re not getting any help from the major Democratic donors.
#
Our campaign is scrappy, tough, and NOT beholden to anyone.
That’s why reaching our fundraising goal of **1,000 donations** will send such a big message to the Democratic establishment.
Well, I have an update on that fundraising goal:
On Tuesday we were 134 donations away. **Today we are just SEVEN donations away from reaching 1,000 donations this month!**
[**_Will you make one of the final seven donations we need to reach our fundraising goal of 1,000 before midnight tonight? This is your last chance to chip in and make an impact this month._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/635?refcode=em20210430-60&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=60%2E3698%2EuMrxVQ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/635?refcode=em20210430-60&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=60%2E3698%2EuMrxVQ)**
I’ve worked on many campaign finance programs by now, and let me tell you: A campaign can be won or lost by the amount of money raised early on.
That’s why meeting EVERY SINGLE fundraising goal we set for ourselves is so important. Unlike other establishment campaigns in this primary, we’re not getting any help from the major Democratic donors.
Instead, we’re appealing directly to good people like you online. People who believe that issues like Medicare for All, reparations, and a Green New Deal* aren’t just possible in North Carolina, but urgent and necessary.
[**_So, will you be one of the final 7 donations we need to reach 1,000 individual donations during the month of April? Let’s show just how strong our campaign is and carve out space for ourselves in this Democratic primary._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/635?refcode=em20210430-60&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=60%2E3698%2EuMrxVQ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/635?refcode=em20210430-60&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=60%2E3698%2EuMrxVQ)**
Thank you so much,
Jayla Gilliam
Finance Director, Erica for U.S. Senate
* Hold up, did you know that Erica is the ONLY candidate in this race who supports all three of these critical issues? [**_All the more reason to kick a few dollars our way and send Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate in North Carolina._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/635?refcode=em20210430-60&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=60%2E3698%2EuMrxVQ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210430-60-footer&t=24&refcode2=60_3698_uMrxVQ&akid=60%2E3698%2EuMrxVQ)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Matt Royer
subject: Did you see Ibraheem's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate

As a proud progressive I'll always fight for the people and not the Corporate PACs or special-interest groups.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Roger=20Marshall?=
subject: What do you think about Joe Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Marshall
body:
I want to hear from YOU.

https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf
This week, Joe Biden gave his first address to Congress. He’s barely been in office for 100 days, but he’s already done tremendous damage to our country.

Biden has created a border crisis. He’s catered to the woke mob with executive orders targeting girls’ sports and our Second Amendment rights. He’s trying to raise your taxes.

And worst of all, he’s trying to rig our government by ending the filibuster, packing the Supreme Court, and making DC a state.

I think the Biden administration is a disaster — but I want to know what you think. Will you take my April Biden Approval Poll? It only takes a few seconds. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf)
BIDEN APPROVAL POLL » (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf)
In the U.S. Senate, I’m helping lead the charge against Biden’s terrible agenda.

I’ve been to our border to see the Biden Border Crisis firsthand — and I’ve laid out steps we must take to solve it. I’ve introduced bills to protect girls’ sports and roll back Biden’s worst executive orders. And I’m calling out the Democrats’ power grabs that threaten our Republic.

But I want to know where conservatives like you stand. Click here to take my April Biden Approval Poll. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf)

It will only take a few seconds — and your input is critical to our effort.

https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf
Senator Roger Marshall
BIDEN APPROVAL POLL » (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf)

============================================================
** (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/april-biden-approval?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021april28hf)
Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, click here () . The message sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by: Kansans for Marshall PO Box 1588 Great Bend, KS 67530 Paid for by Kansans for Marshall

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Pelosi’s plot to cancel prayer
body:
Fellow American
Nancy Pelosi is attacking religious liberty and prohibiting prayer on the U.S. Capitol grounds– again.
We’re filing a motion for preliminary injunction in our lawsuit against Speaker Pelosi for her blatant disregard for the First Amendment – and gearing up for our day in court.
But we need your immediate help.
**[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more right now to help fund our critical lawsuit against Nancy Pelosi for her infringement on our freedoms.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e8696d65f0a48adbacbbd3dafce14c0&_e=UJioANzOlpoYS95vjD5rSSyD_a9K2-a82LsLghO3VtboydgrnRxYSMiPytyqbF8MsH0xf4z11pVIKUvCXnrz-W8YbsO9w71P-FUODvPRDnJavxZ9htNDT9_MFh5bmEOk_l6GRC4BC7cAVwp2tMaI2kZtb3k7VrLEo9YZhLr2NsJuKPVY2n5xXILUsAdw2ndqg25EwE2Ag62Pl7SRFv9tiCKJBzhlxk3Tn0BZP0eqI8svL5Jso_aqR52op_AoM_pe6AAsGoJ6g4SiA6GAQI5yzCynoceDxPkrfo7C5mYZf0roNqlmFhrFuoNXB4QfSSWlIFYQ2XispR7x2lVh2hW4QygmFkkhmo1SAmkTczgCNzgrXncoILdP3vatMnTr-yiH4e8MzyiLk41jI0ho4AoXQv_fv5Ppwj_6hu8fa9Fgf8rrdo9hZLoI1JgLAB2nP-Dh3oEWo_ytJqrVaAFhiwBOwA%3D%3D)**
You see, Rev. Patrick Mahoney just wants to hold small, peaceful prayer services at the Capitol.
But Pelosi won’t have it.
Rev. Mahoney filed a permit application to hold a prayer service at the Capitol on Pentecost Sunday...but that application was swiftly denied.
On top of that, his application for a prayer service on the National Day of Prayer, a tradition that goes back nearly **70 years** , was denied too.
**Speaker Pelosi didn’t allow Rev. Mahoney to pray on the Capitol Grounds on Good Friday either.**
While Antifa “protesters" are running wild in the streets and burning down private property, faithful Americans are being banned from exercising their right of peaceful public prayer for our country at the Capitol.
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded Center for American Liberties specifically to fight threats to our First Amendment rights.
And we’re winning.
Just this year we’ve already won THREE cases in front of the Supreme Court of the United States. But we’re not stopping.
You and I know our religious liberty is worth defending. More than that – it’s one of the core principles our country was founded on.
That’s why we filed a lawsuit against Nancy Pelosi for this shameless infringement on our American freedoms.
**[Help us take the fight to Nancy Pelosi today with a gift of $35 or more to defend religious liberty before it’s too late.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e8696d65f0a48adbacbbd3dafce14c0&_e=UJioANzOlpoYS95vjD5rSSyD_a9K2-a82LsLghO3VtboydgrnRxYSMiPytyqbF8MsH0xf4z11pVIKUvCXnrz-W8YbsO9w71P-FUODvPRDnJavxZ9htNDT9_MFh5bmEOk_l6GRC4BC7cAVwp2tMaI2kZtb3k7VrLEo9YZhLr2NsJuKPVY2n5xXILUsAdw2ndqg25EwE2Ag62Pl7SRFv9tiCKJBzhlxk3Tn0BZP0eqI8svL5Jso_aqR52op_AoM_pep85cQbL6feRZRXwTVNtiOkRwQgrI0ZmH_zq6U96bjowcyP1olhdSUijThXhVG8XqucDyTcN5MN0oO68XEDmgecV8HQgtmJoEODJRTfudm22YMnRYqqDQNT1EETRf4Qmzt9DGw8CEL6vxSOT6abRRjfQok4fly8Ou_E7NV5KvRIqXTXlP6WqzCIBjZK2-9XMdyMBZxHJx-yxqHYLJxNNWXQ%3D%3D)**
The Founding Fathers firmly believed in the principle that we owe our gratitude and prayers to the loving Creator who made us and who protects our country.
And if there was ever a place in need of divine intervention, it’s the U.S. Capitol.
But radical leftists like Pelosi are looking for any excuse they can find to crush your freedoms and control our lives.
It’s up to patriots like you and me to fight back.
And we are – but there isn’t a moment to waste!
**[With the National Day of Prayer and Pentecost Sunday right around the corner, I’m asking you to join the fight with a donation of $35 or more today.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e8696d65f0a48adbacbbd3dafce14c0&_e=UJioANzOlpoYS95vjD5rSSyD_a9K2-a82LsLghO3VtboydgrnRxYSMiPytyqbF8MsH0xf4z11pVIKUvCXnrz-W8YbsO9w71P-FUODvPRDnJavxZ9htNDT9_MFh5bmEOk_l6GRC4BC7cAVwp2tMaI2kZtb3k7VrLEo9YZhLr2NsJuKPVY2n5xXILUsAdw2ndqg25EwE2Ag62Pl7SRFv9tiPvNAtkMFJaKfxsYWfs45DlvGBOw_KHBndehEA3uuG6RP3EUlz8Lb3RfdJdSw-DSWXnwrKtDtJiNyP9hy6Pz4g3T7r7NS1zgAPr2QxRr_1H1A8lgRAuzMU-v_wHLvjrnJfQecsDmBjkMtgqkeAZAFCH4l-Yu15rnZPiyTO-s6ZuKxaZHJZFK1-7kqxvjfmPEN8vzQlpLOG1-SVKFmQ1FDhrl5a8_Y8zRmGP-pbSP2nAfSmY3W2hyJ8lniqErXzU9jw%3D%3D)**
_The National Day of Prayer in its current form goes back 70 years, but its roots go back to the founding of our country._
It was founded because Americans realized that prayer is crucial in keeping us the greatest country in the world.
And Pentecost Sunday as you know is an important day of prayer for Christians.
Time is running out.
If we let the radical left and Speaker Pelosi win this battle, they won’t stop until all of our freedoms are stripped away.
**[Help us stop Speaker Pelosi and restore prayer on the Capitol grounds with an urgent gift of $35 or more today to help fund this critical lawsuit.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e8696d65f0a48adbacbbd3dafce14c0&_e=UJioANzOlpoYS95vjD5rSSyD_a9K2-a82LsLghO3VtboydgrnRxYSMiPytyqbF8MsH0xf4z11pVIKUvCXnrz-W8YbsO9w71P-FUODvPRDnJavxZ9htNDT9_MFh5bmEOk_l6GRC4BC7cAVwp2tMaI2kZtb3k7VrLEo9YZhLr2NsJuKPVY2n5xXILUsAdw2ndqg25EwE2Ag62Pl7SRFv9tiCKJBzhlxk3Tn0BZP0eqI8svL5Jso_aqR52op_AoM_peYPU_SKCiWCdYNe-yrwlRkXm8gWW35xIevT855oa54rY3Dd3jlhmJFZbDzvYxwrG_Auh-cdhxRWvfPg7VD7Umj3JKRjVulv9USalkap1vMgGxn_Wk6GYReirbdleOvA5jUBywL-20JmFy1LsSnVvMQEFv5RpMrsE6T0g2arFMV8RdNiMrWjtlz-HdgFhVMyYgofmhpCD0eeVyFsYeOzMY9w%3D%3D)**
We still have time to fight, but not long.
**The National Day of Prayer is only days away, and Pentecost Sunday is soon after that.**
We can’t give up these days where Americans will be offering their prayers for our country together. Especially not when our country needs those prayers so badly.
I need the help of faithful patriots like you right now.
Thank you in advance for your support.
Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon clean_body: I was so honored to deliver the official Republican Address to the Nation the other night and present a clear conservative contrast | | Peter, I was so honored to deliver the official Republican Address to the Nation the other night and present a clear conservative contrast with the failed liberal policies of President Biden. Democrats are busy moving us toward socialism and denouncing America’s history and values, Republicans are focused on expanding economic opportunity to kickstart our recovery from last year. But Peter, we cannot stop the Democrats’ radical transformation of our country and get Americans back to work without your help. Will you pitch in a donation of $100, $50, $25 or any amount you can to fight for America and stop the radical Democrats? In his speech, Joe Biden laid out a dangerous agenda that fundamentally transforms America. He’s calling for higher taxes, open borders, gun control, the Green New Deal and to roll back our Constitutional freedoms. As I write this email, Joe Biden and his allies are raising MILLIONS of dollars from Hollywood liberals and radical activists to attack our conservative values. I need you to stand with me and keep fighting for the future of our country. We can’t give in and lose years of progress on tax cuts, judges, and economic opportunity reform, let alone our precious rights and freedoms. Peter, will you chip in to defend our conservative values and stop Joe Biden’s socialist agenda? Tim Scott | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

subject: Can I count on you?

| Peter,

[_**Our monthly fundraising deadline is tonight, and I want to take a moment to let you know why your contributions are so important.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/opHwqBBcR0qdJ93nZUeNng05TdcjqZKxN5U2IdU_dBk=/_ANCIUgleTlCGY1W72R0DoV_JIefuGux4QytWw_nTSQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210430-2-EM&amount=25)

Before my election in 2018, Republicans held this seat for almost half a century. They are desperate to take it back in 2022, and they are already saying that this seat is one of their top targets. Outside groups spent millions of dollars on ads attacking my campaign and me last year, and now they are already back at it -- they have been running attack ads against me and phone banking into our district.

By contributing anything you can today, you make sure we can withstand these attacks and pay for the critical elements of our campaign. To win, we will need a great team, literature for canvassers, digital ads, TV ads, and eventually an office where we will again bring our community of volunteers together!

[_**Our grassroots network has always been a core part of our strategic advantage. Today, can I count on you for a contribution before our deadline?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/opHwqBBcR0qdJ93nZUeNng05TdcjqZKxN5U2IdU_dBk=/_ANCIUgleTlCGY1W72R0DoV_JIefuGux4QytWw_nTSQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210430-2-EM&amount=25)

I am working hard in Congress to improve people's lives in Central Virginia, and with your support, that is what I will continue to do!

Thank you,

Abigail

| Peter,

clean_body: This was truly inspiring to see. | Peter, Ever since Kimberly Guilfoyle emailed you about the goal she set for our end-of-month deadline, grassroots donors all over America stepped up. This truly is a grassroots campaign. But now that we’re just hours out from the end-of-month deadline tonight, we still need to raise another $8,640, so I’m going to unlock one more match for the next hour. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Kimberly Guilfoyle, me (2) Sent: Mon, Apr 26, 2021 Subject: Did you see my note? To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, I set an ambitious end-of-month goal for our FIRST DEADLINE since I joined Governor Greitens’ Senate campaign as his National Chair. But right now, we still need to raise another $34,812 before the deadline. To ensure we crush this goal and ensure a pro-Trump conservative wins this open Senate seat, I’ve secured a MATCH for the next hour. Thank you, Kimberly Guilfoyle National Chair Greitens for U.S. Senate \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Kimberly Guilfoyle Sent: Mon, Apr 19, 2021 Subject: RE: NEW POSITION To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, I am excited to tell you that I am joining Governor Greitens’ team as National Chair of his Senate campaign for the open seat in Missouri. Governor Greitens is a Navy SEAL who has stood with President Donald J. Trump and has a proven record of advancing conservative, America First policies. As my first order of business, I want to help Governor Greitens CRUSH his end-of-month fundraising goal. I most recently served President Trump as the National Chair of Trump Victory Finance Committee in 2020. The 2022 midterm elections are our chance to help President Trump take back the reins of our country from the radical Left. That’s why it’s simply not enough to elect Republicans next year... ...We need to elect conservatives like Governor Greitens who will put America First and have the spine to FIGHT for our values. With your help, we will crush Governor Greitens’ fundraising goal just like we did for President Trump last year. name: Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
subject: UPDATE Maricopa Audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ****WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE**
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c080%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bwhfE1zf7SbXXRKeyKQfQQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1405%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YmBJmq%2fGdRAtRf3xabTBaQ&sysid=1) Dear Friend \-- You wanted to get the truth behind the 2020 vote in Maricopa County. I did too. Today, we are one step closer. I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the pro-Trump firebrand Arizona State Senator who is putting America First in Arizona! **[Can you help me stand strong for election integrity?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1406%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SH02g7bDSUPV0XEWj2zKmw&sysid=1)** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1405%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YmBJmq%2fGdRAtRf3xabTBaQ&sysid=1) This is no vapid partisan exercise. Facebook paid millions to the Maricopa Board of Supervisors to ensure the vote would go the way Big Tech wanted. **We need to know the truth.** The Washington Examiner reports: Arizona’s state Senate is set to begin a major audit of ballots from the state’s largest county after months of being reportedly blocked by county officials. _"It's taken the Senate 2 1/2 months to win in court to uphold our right to issue subpoenas for election materials," said state Senate President Karen Fann, "and another six weeks of researching to select the audit team to perform the full forensic audit."_ _Arizona’s Republican-controlled Senate has had subpoenas to the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors pending since Dec. 15 and has battled in court for the right to access to information and equipment needed to perform the audit._ _A judge upheld the chamber’s right to issue the subpoenas, paving the way for a “detailed” review of the county’s ballots to include "testing the machines, scanning the ballots, performing a full hand count, and checking for any IT breaches."_ _Now, Republicans in the state are ironing out the final details on how to conduct the audit, with lawmakers accusing county officials of attempting to “sabotage” the effort._ _**But the lawmakers were able to secure a “20,000-plus square foot facility known as the Coliseum at our state fairgrounds to perform the audit" and will have 24-hour physical and livestream security at the site.**_ _"The Arizona Senate and the auditors have no 'expectations' of findings," Fann said. "We are performing the full forensic audit to either dispel our voters' concerns or, if a problem is uncovered, we must fix the problems before the next election."_ So here we see... we had to subpoena the ballots, sue the Maricopa Board of Supervisors, secure a separate facility, and hire an auditor ourselves. **But we got it done and now we will FINALLY get to the bottom of what happened in Maricopa.** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1405%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YmBJmq%2fGdRAtRf3xabTBaQ&sysid=1) I am helping Arizona take action! I am the deciding vote on the action taken by the Arizona Senate to find the truth of the 2020 Election and ensure our elections are more secure going forward. The left-wing press is attacking me constantly. If I don't buy ads, the truth never gets out. It's expensive, but worth it. **[Will you stand with me for election integrity?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1407%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bapa3pqf8PiIIDwkAGsQDQ&sysid=1)** What we are doing can be done in other places. **[Can you stand with us today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1408%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xywx37v0mjsxJBR11E6Syw&sysid=1)** I am keeping my promises to fight for you! Help me send a message - America is in chaos due to Biden, but Arizona can choose differently! Thank you and God bless you. Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret) Arizona State Senator Arizona's 6th Legislative District [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1405%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YmBJmq%2fGdRAtRf3xabTBaQ&sysid=1) P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. **[Please support me by helping me reach fundraising my goal by April 30th.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1409%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KgL5t85%2fx0h4acOog1w36A&sysid=1)** Thank you.

**PAID FOR BY ****WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE**
Wendy Rogers is a retired member of the Air Force. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c080%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bwhfE1zf7SbXXRKeyKQfQQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c080%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bwhfE1zf7SbXXRKeyKQfQQ&sysid=1)

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nNbo8xXMhR_R6GSPtQzY3mN3CDpCremYPzC-exxWtPk=/scuxEQQ2fwsvqFUD-inslnAp6aROjA-V5AP0aaXBUho=?refcode=043021EOM3)
| | Friend, I am reminded each and every day I go to work how important your support is. Without you, we would not have protected our majority in the Minnesota House. Without you, Republicans would have complete control of the Legislature. Without you, we would not have advanced a budget that focuses on equity, sustainability, and a brighter future for all Minnesotans. Exciting news: we reached our goal for the end of the month. However, as we look to the end of the legislative session, we know that campaigning needs to start in just a few short weeks. The more we raise now, the more we can do later. If you are able to, [_please consider making a contribution to the House DFL_.](https://act.myngp.com/el/nNbo8xXMhR_R6GSPtQzY3mN3CDpCremYPzC-exxWtPk=/scuxEQQ2fwsvqFUD-inslnAp6aROjA-V5AP0aaXBUho=?refcode=043021EOM3) Just because we met our goal does not mean we should stop building our campaign. More resources allow us to help more Democrats get elected to the Minnesota House. Your support means the world to us, and it is a duty we don't take lightly during our work at the Capitol. Thank you for your continued support. Looking forward to seeing you, in person, on the campaign trail very soon. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nNbo8xXMhR_R6GSPtQzY3mN3CDpCremYPzC-exxWtPk=/scuxEQQ2fwsvqFUD-inslnAp6aROjA-V5AP0aaXBUho=?refcode=043021EOM3)

name: Petition <Via LeftAction>
subject: Bring Back the White House Rose Garden — Undo Melania’s Damage
body:
It was a thing of beauty -- until Melania killed it (Before and after photo)
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/undomelaniasdamagebringbackthewhitehouserosegarden1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | |
### **[Sign the Petition: Undo Melania's Damage - Bring Back the Rose Garden](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c84b2b9-6295-4682-9c12-7291e8c83f8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
Hi Friend, Thanks to the work of Jackie Kennedy, the White House rose garden was transformed into a beautiful setting known and admired throughout the land. [**Until Melania Trump killed it. Well, turned it into a lawn.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0ccb55b-054b-42f4-92f1-29cb343abc05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00e28a57-a76f-4852-b02c-e9fa63c79c98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s time to bring it back. God knows, we’ve got a lot of Trump damage to undo (pandemic, economy, etc), but let’s add this to the list. Because we all could use more beauty — and normalcy. [**Add your name: “Undo Melania’s damage—bring back the Rose Garden.”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae490266-e917-49a6-8931-91c5d089d388/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Congressman Pfluger
subject: If we lose this seat, we might lose our chance to take back the HOUSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9520597/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk1MjA1OTc%3d&x=07984191) at any time.

**We are just ONE day away from the most important special election we've ever seen, Fellow Conservative. **

The election here in Texas for the Sixth Congressional District is a crucial first step to helping Donald Trump take back the House, **and****we need your help. **

I'll be frank with you, Fellow Conservative. This election is going to be tight, and we need all hands on deck to keep it RED.

This is why I've allowed for an emergency 600% matching to be activated in order to keep this seat Republican to hold off the radical liberals from forcing their socialist agenda here in Texas.

[**Will you stand up against the left and donate now to keep Texas 6 RED? **](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9520597/224717773/199312/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=51d21c49)

[**CHIP INTO THE SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9520597/224717773/199312/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=9ddb59f2)

We're only FIVE seats away from restoring Trump's Conservative Majority in Congress, but losing this seat will only bring us farther away from doing so.

There's no time to waste, Fellow Conservative. This is your last chance to stand against the _RADICAL LEFT_ and help defend President Trump's legacy.

[**Rush any contribution NOW for 6x matching.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9520597/224717773/199312/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=78741e6a)

_President Trump and the people of Texas are counting on you. Don't let us down._

Thank you,

Congressman August Pfluger

[**CHIP INTO THE SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9520597/224717773/199312/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=3011bda4)

name: Tim Scott
subject: I want to have an honest conversation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
****
Are you up for an honest conversation about the future of our country?

You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9521369/224717773/2036/2/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk1MjEzNjk%3d&x=e8199f9f) at any time.

Friend,

Are you up for an honest conversation about the future of our country?

President Biden promised to unite our nation. He promised to work with Republicans and Democrats to get things done on behalf of the American people.

**But three months in, the actions of the President and the far-left fringes of his party are pulling us further apart.**

On issue after issue, President Biden has purposely ignored ideas coming from Republicans. Instead, Democrats are laser-focused on undoing the work of the Trump Administration and enacting a socialist agenda that threatens the very foundations of our country.

We cannot sit on the sidelines any longer -- [**we need every patriot to chip in just $10, $25, $50 or whatever you can afford to help protect the conservative values we hold dear.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9521369/224717773/199321/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=6969e7f6)

When America comes together, we've made tremendous progress. But powerful forces want to pull us apart.

President Biden inherited an economy that was ready for a rebound -- largely thanks to the bipartisan work to provide relief to families and small businesses.

Thanks to Operation Warp Speed and the Trump Administration, our country is flooded with safe and effective vaccines.

But the far Left wants to erase all of our success to push a socialist agenda.

[**Friend, I am asking you to join our team and help us win back the House and Senate.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9521369/224717773/199321/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=69ef5d0f)
_****_
[Join Our Team](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9521369/224717773/199321/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=c6e920f8)
---

Now here's the tough part to swallow. The honest truth.

Joe Biden and the Democrats are raising millions of dollars from liberal activists. They are going all-in to cement their majorities in the House and Senate.

We cannot afford to be outraised at such a critical moment. [**Please, join our team by chipping in whatever you can afford so we can win.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9521369/224717773/199321/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=0133dcd1)

Tim Scott

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

body:
We’re extending our D.C. statehood survey for one final day. We want to make sure we have everyone’s opinion on the disaster that is D.C. statehood. Lisa Scheller here. name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: As California goes...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
We have good news and bad news on the campaign front... Read more >>
Peter, All eyes will be on California this year. You know the phrase — _As California goes, so goes the nation_. We aren’t the only state with an out-of-touch, elitist governor who looks down on his state from an ivory tower, but we are the most visible. And now that we’re officially headed to a recall election, the nation will be watching. **We MUST beat Gavin Newsom,_and Kevin_ _is the best candidate for the job._** I just pulled our online fundraising numbers for April, and there is good news and bad news. The good news is that people from all over the state and all walks of life are showing up and chipping in to OUST Gavin Newsom in 2021. _The bad news is that we’re still $8,500 short of hitting our goal by MIDNIGHT tonight!_ **Can you help us close the gap and make sure we have the grassroots funding we need for a California Comeback?** [**CHIP IN BEFORE TONIGHT'S DEADLINE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/24522c2a84395d36c3d6b838967d376c/34943) **There IS a better way, and Kevin Faulconer is a proven leader who knows how to get results.** **[Please RUSH your donation before midnight TONIGHT.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/aa7493b82ebecf0dc3d6b838967d376c/34943)** With your help, we can get Gavin Newsom out of office, and get to work for Californians. Thanks for your help,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager _P.S. Your donation will directly fund our grassroots outreach efforts. The key in this race will be getting Kevin’s message to every voter. Will you rush a contribution right now?**[DONATE>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/a2f4ccf1934f4cb5c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**_ | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/f1ca25efbd048c6ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/cae371ee46ac19eec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/935156c68e387e95c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3dd6afc6c339c1a1/2bf31bc168c99d61c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta

body:
The GOP just attacked me for supporting climate action
#

Wow. Look at what I just saw on Twitter:
The GOP just attacked me, saying I’m “off the rails” for supporting science-based climate action.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28482647/283385904/-347207331?refcode2=1785437a-10aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210430-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzg1NDM3YS0xMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbbbOlmnHKHuAFfKIaA9djQA6NdVKQgv6gniLoI20iI=)
What’s _off the rails_ is Republicans’ outright denial of the climate crisis and their refusal to take any action.
Their solution to the climate crisis to let working families die — my solution is to invest in family-sustaining, green union jobs.
**And personally, I think working families will like my idea better.**
[Friend, if you agree, will you pitch in before our campaign’s April fundraising deadline? body:

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Chip in before midnight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ Super PAC pledges to spend $10 million to defeat Mark Kelly in 2022 Senate race**
_Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?refcode=em210430-2-subs&t=1&refcode2=537_6688874_1yaaLC&akid=537%2E6688874%2E1yaaLC)**
* * *
Friends —
On Wednesday, Mark reached out himself about how important hitting our 35,000 contribution goal is.
Then yesterday our Finance Director, Lily, sent an email personally asking for your help because National Republicans are already working to take this seat back, which means we can’t afford to fall short.
And this morning our Campaign Manager, Emma, reached out again because this week a Super PAC pledged to spend $10 million to defeat us in next year’s Arizona Senate race.
All eyes are on us to see if we still have the same deep bench of support we did in 2020. And with this new attention being placed on us by Super PACs, we can’t afford to fall short now.
**Our deadline is in just a few hours, and your last-minute support could give us the edge we need to hit our goal and fight back. Which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation before our April fundraising deadline? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 35,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?refcode=em210430-2-subs&t=2&refcode2=537_6688874_1yaaLC&akid=537%2E6688874%2E1yaaLC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: Breaking News: Super PAC pledges to spend $10 million to defeat Mark Kelly in 2022 Senate race Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate! Friends — On Wednesday, Mark reached out himself about how important hitting our 35,000 contribution goal is. Then yesterday our Finance Director, Lily, sent an email personally asking for your help because National Republicans are already working to take this seat back, which means we can’t afford to fall short. And this morning our Campaign Manager, Emma, reached out again because this week a Super PAC pledged to spend $10 million to defeat us in next year’s Arizona Senate race. All eyes are on us to see if we still have the same deep bench of support we did in 2020. And with this new attention being placed on us by Super PACs, we can’t afford to fall short now. Our deadline is in just a few hours, and your last-minute support could give us the edge we need to hit our goal and fight back. Which is why we have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us as we gear up to run again in 2022. Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you! Team Kelly ** Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

body:
With your help, we can fund back up childcare for our candidates. We have to keep up the good work. Hi Peter, We have accomplished so much this month thanks to everyone chipping in to fund our Childcare Fund. The Moms in Office Childcare Fund covered backup childcare costs for three of our candidates in April.
**We will keep this brief.** With our April fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, we need to ask if you’re able to chip in to help reach our goal and continue this important work in the months ahead. Our goal is within reach, the donations we could receive in these final hours would make all the difference. Whether or not we achieve this goal will impact our organization’s budget moving forward, and we can’t afford to fall short--**[will you be one of the people we need to close our April fundraising gap and keep Moms in Office fighting for gender equity in our government?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28484571/283408556/600483780?refcode=0430&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllZGJjYWE4LTFhYWEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JfSIaGGi5GGnc17e047oG0VVUPML7yKbHpSj_hoJBF0=)** Your contribution will fund our Childcare Fund for the month of May and go directly toward covering the cost of childcare for our endorsed candidates while campaigning. clean_body: With your help, we can fund back up childcare for our candidates. We have to keep up the good work. Hi Peter, We have accomplished so much this month thanks to everyone chipping in to fund our Childcare Fund. The Moms in Office Childcare Fund covered backup childcare costs for three of our candidates in April. We will keep this brief. With our April fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, we need to ask if you’re able to chip in to help reach our goal and continue this important work in the months ahead. Our goal is within reach, the donations we could receive in these final hours would make all the difference. Whether or not we achieve this goal will impact our organization’s budget moving forward, and we can’t afford to fall short--= Your contribution will fund our Childcare Fund for the month of May and go directly toward covering the cost of childcare for our endorsed candidates while campaigning. I would not be asking you directly if this was not so important, Peter. have been given an opportunity to level the playing field and make a difference for women running for office. = = = = = Thank you for all of your help! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . body:
| | | | Literally the biggest lawsuit since Obama (it's crazy)!
---
---
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, **I filed a petition before the U.S. Supreme Cour** t to stop the EPA from exercising unlimited authority to regulate the American economy, and act without garnering congressional approval for its **radical** **energy price-hiking and job-killing actions.**
West Virginia led a **19 state coalition** to overturn a DC Court decision that the EPA believes gives it boundless power to advance President Biden’s radical climate agenda.
You may recall that in 2016 my Office previously stopped the Obama Power Plan-Biden’s new proposal represents the Obama plan on steroids.
The Constitution doesn’t allow for the creation of an all-powerful, all-mighty EPA-especially without congressional action.
**This filing is the biggest of the year. And the stakes couldn’t be higher. **

| **Dear ****Derek,**

**This is the final week to sign up for next week’s reception on May 6th with Corey Lewandowski,**[**and I encourage anyone yet to purchase a ticket to do so soon, as tickets are limited! **](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnhgop-reception-with-corey-r-lewandowski%2F/1/0100017924b283cc-68437e10-1915-4f8a-9e6a-36edba5f07ff-000000/pPJ2jsO3cSA8BNgfguxBv8ks-oI=212)**

On Wednesday, we watched Joe Biden’s blunderous address to the nation on his first 100 days in office. President Biden began his term at the White House by hosting a sluggish Covid-19 response while refusing to engage in clarifying dialogue with state leadership. He went on to target the pockets of Americans with his non-infrastructure, infrastructure plan - with a $2 trillion dollar [tax hike](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fnam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com%2F%3Furl=https%253A%252F%252Fwww.axios.com%252Fbiden-tax-plan-increases-b8905001-1ef2-45c8-8165-87ac89d1c2fe.html%26data=04%257C01%257CRLee%2540gop.com%257Cdaa364fb20be4edbfed008d909ceaf0c%257C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%257C1%257C0%257C637551605567028238%257CUnknown%257CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%253D%257C1000%26sdata=z2DxWSBao%252BPvBOUR%252FJVuSzR1fjjIf%252BE%252FxIop5ZgG9iI%253D%26reserved=0/1/0100017924b283cc-68437e10-1915-4f8a-9e6a-36edba5f07ff-000000/wwxyVz3CcPL2AsZjRyd7nQc64oQ=212). Since less than 10% of the plan went to actual elements of infrastructure, it’s no surprise he’s already released a second plan - this time with a price tag of [$4 trillion](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fbiden-infrastructure-bill-package-4-trillion-with-tax-hikes-2021-3/1/0100017924b283cc-68437e10-1915-4f8a-9e6a-36edba5f07ff-000000/qmoyZQReZZAC6H1FjsV8CXZoQgo=212) dollars. This is the last action that should be taken against families and small businesses financially recovering from the Covid-19 pandemic. Meanwhile, Vice President Harris’s refusal to visit our southern border has led to a critical state of crisis, and Harris[ laughs](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fpolitics%2Fkamala-harris-laughing-border-question-backlash-cornyn/1/0100017924b283cc-68437e10-1915-4f8a-9e6a-36edba5f07ff-000000/nnacIRF0i5Qz4RV4ZjsULqCkSvQ=212)**** while states directly suffer from her lack of leadership. As the radical left applauds the failures of Biden and Harris, Republicans will continue working to earn the votes of Granite Staters and take back U.S. House and Senate Majorities in 2022! **

---

| **Republican Leaders Reject Washington Infringement on 2nd Amendment Rights**
Concord, NH- House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) and Chairman of House Criminal Justice and Public Safety Committee Daryl Abbas (R-Salem) released the following statements after the Criminal Justice Committee passed SB154, prohibiting the state from enforcing a Presidential Executive Order that restricts or regulates the right of the people to keep and bear arms, on a vote of 11-10.
**House Majority Leader Jason Osborne:**
“After much discussion in Washington over the last few months about Executive Orders that would severely restrict our Second Amendments rights, it is abundantly clear that something has to be done. These potential Executive Orders, or any laws enacted by Congress, would impede New Hampshire citizens’ basic rights to defend themselves.”
“New Hampshire’s firearms laws are clear, and as a result, we are consistently ranked as one of the safest states in the nation. This bill would do nothing to change our current laws, it would simply say that New Hampshire rejects Washington edicts and we will not be enforcing them.”
**Chairman Daryl Abbas:**
“New Hampshire should not be required to enforce federal laws and executive orders from the President of the United States that restrict the rights to bear arms that are inconsistent with New Hampshire's laws and traditions.”

“If these out of state federal politicians enact policies infringing on our second amendment rights here in New Hampshire, that is their agenda and they should take responsibility for enforcing their agendas especially when the people of New Hampshire have historically rejected these types of infringements.”
###
---
| |
---
| **Republican Spotlight : Ben Mickens **
---
| |
---
| | **In this week’s republican spotlight, we are highlighting Ben Mickens. Raised in California, Ben decided to attend college in New Hampshire at Saint Anselm College. On campus, Ben takes part in their honors program, as well as the Abby Players. Now a Junior, Ben was elected as the state’s College Republican’s Chair. ****
It is important that young people get involved in politics because they are the future of America. The work that Ben Mickens will be doing is setting the stage for a successful future - with strong leaders, there are people bound to follow. He demonstrates leadership by maintaining open communication with his peers.
****Thank you, Ben Mickens, for all of your hard work. We are excited to see the energy you’ll bring to New Hampshire’s College Republicans, and wish you the best of luck in your endeavors. **
---

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Three from your community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our April goal is within reach, and a surge of donations in these final hours would make all the difference.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210430-2062-header&t=1&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)
**Almost all of our campaign’s fundraising comes from small-dollar contributions to online ads and emails just like this one.**
But in this past month, we’ve prioritized fundraising for our neighbors when massive fires broke out in Jackson Heights, Queens, for the new Nevada Democratic Party after the old party establishment left them without a penny, and for other progressive campaigns across the country.
It’s important for us to share these opportunities with you so that we meet these moments with the most support possible. And we’re constantly blown away by your generosity. Thank you for all that you do.
But with our campaign’s April fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, we need to ask if you’re able to chip in to help hit our goal and continue this important work in the months ahead. Our goal is within reach, and a surge of donations in these final hours would make all the difference.
[We’ve done the math, and if we can get three contributions from your community — we’ll be on track to meet our budget. With just hours left before our midnight deadline, can we count on you to chip in $3 or anything you can to hit this goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210430?refcode=em20210430-2062-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2062_2526796_u9f2SS&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210430?refcode=em20210430-2062-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2062_2526796_u9f2SS&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)**
Alexandria is using her voice in Congress to fight for solutions that are big enough to match the crises we face, reshape our economy, minimize inequality and reverse the effects of climate change. And this work requires building a strong grassroots movement.
Our campaign is 100% people-funded, and every contribution to emails like this one — $5, $10, and $20 at a time — truly adds up to compete against the powerful and corrupting influence of big money in our politics.
Whether or not we hit this goal will impact our campaign’s budget moving forward, and we can’t afford to fall short — [Will you be one of the people we need from your community to help close our April fundraising gap and keep Alexandria fighting for the better future our communities deserve?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210430?refcode=em20210430-2062-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2062_2526796_u9f2SS&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210430?refcode=em20210430-2062-P&t=24&refcode2=2062_2526796_u9f2SS&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2062%2E2526796%2Eu9f2SS)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Tom Fitton
subject: SMOKING GUNS on Big Tech Censorship!
body:
Taxpayer Cash for Illegal Aliens?

[INSIDE JW]

California Officials Pressured Big Tech to Censor Social Media
Election Posts

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22781&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9ZVTFramp1UjEtZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQzMDIxNTM1NQ==]

We now have chilling details of California state officials and Big
Tech executives conspiring to uproot the First Amendment and influence
the 2020 election. And, key targets were Judicial Watch and me.

The proof is in 540 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22728&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhLXNvcy1iaWctdGVjaC1lbGVjdGlvbi1taXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi1wcmEtZm9pYS0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQzMDIxNTM1NQ==]
and
a supplemental four pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22729&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhLXNvcy1iaWctdGVjaC1lbGVjdGlvbi1taXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi1wcmEtdHJhY2tpbmctMjAyMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MzAyMTUzNTU=]
of
documents we received from the office of the Secretary of State of
California revealing how state officials pressured social media
companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about
the 2020 election. Included in these documents were “misinformation
briefings” emails that were compiled by communications firm SKDK,
which lists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22730&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2tka25pY2suY29tL3RoYW5rLXlvdS10by1hbGwtb2Ytb3VyLXBvbGl0aWNhbC1jbGllbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQzMDIxNTM1NQ==]
Biden
for President as their top client
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22731&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhLXNvcy1iaWctdGVjaC1za2RrLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQzMDIxNTM1NQ==]
of
2020.

The documents show how the state agency successfully pressured YouTube
to censor my Judicial Watch video concerning the vote by mail and a
Judicial Watch lawsuit settlement about California voter roll clean
up.

We received the records in response to our California Public Records
Act (CPRA) requests to the Office of the California Secretary of State
for records related to the Office of Election Cybersecurity’s
database of social media posts; communications with social media
companies; and other social media related records regarding the 2020
elections. We filed the requests after a December 2020 report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22732&F=T&]
surfaced
that the state agency was surveilling, tracking, and seeking to censor
the speech of Americans:

The Office of Election Cybersecurity in the California Secretary of
State’s office monitored and tracked social media posts, decided if
they were misinformation, stored the posts in an internal database
coded by threat level, and on 31 different occasions requested posts
be removed. In 24 cases, the social media companies agreed and either
took down the posts or flagged them as misinformation, according to
Jenna Dresner, senior public information officer for the Office of
Election Cybersecurity.

“We don’t take down posts, that is not our role to play,”
Dresner said. “We alert potential sources of misinformation to the
social media companies and we let them make that call based on
community standards they created.”

On September 24, 2020, a California Secretary of State chart
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22729&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhLXNvcy1iaWctdGVjaC1lbGVjdGlvbi1taXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi1wcmEtdHJhY2tpbmctMjAyMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MzAyMTUzNTU=]
lists a video
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22733&F=T&]
I
did and falsely alleges
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53573&L=22734&F=T&

Head of conservative group Judicial Watch Hosts video alleging
Democrats benefit from incorrect voter rolls and ballot collection.

The Secretary of State’s office details its communication with
YouTube: “We wanted to flag this YouTube video because it misleads
community members about elections or other civic processes and
misrepresents the safety and security of mail-in ballots.” The chart
quotes me describing Judicial Watch’s statement about its federal
lawsuit settlement with Los Angeles County that will require it to
clean up voter rolls and how a Michigan court “changed the rules”
on ballot deadlines and ballot harvesting. (The controversial decision
was overturned

These documents detail a conspiracy against the First Amendment rights
of Americans by the California Secretary of State, the Biden campaign
